highlights.summary:
Udemy offers specialized courses to a range of learners, from novices to experts. Learners get the flexibility to choose courses on trending subjects as well as traditional subjects including IT, data science, artificial intelligence, coding, machine learning, business management, etc. Courses on these subjects will be delivered through video classes.

More than 57,000 expert instructors offer over 250,000 online courses at Udemy. These courses are priced reasonably. You can also check the portal for seasonal and ongoing discounts for the best prices.

faqs.question: What is Udemy's Personal Plan? How does it work?
faqs.answer:
Udemy Personal Plan is a subscription-based service which offers unlimited access to thousands of high-quality courses covering different training topics, from business and technology to personal development and creative skills.
It works as a monthly or annual subscription where the user clarifies their intention, and the subscription runs until a stipulated time.
Users can get course-inclusive services until the subscription expires.
Upon cancellation, the course access will no longer be active, unlike purchases of a single course where access is for life.
It also does not include paired Udemy courses. Only selected shares are available.
Limited availability to select regions and specific users.

faqs.question: What types of free courses does Udemy offer?
faqs.answer:
Udemy offers a variety of subjects for free, but they come with limitations. Such free courses are mostly video lectures without a completion certificate. Please note that Q&A support from the instructor and direct messaging are usually not possible with free courses. Some of these free courses may be offered for a limited time, after which they may turn into for-pay courses.
You can view free courses by using the search option on Udemy's catalogue and choosing "Free" underpricing.

faqs.question: How to send a message to a Simplilearn course instructor, in case I have a course-related query?
faqs.answer:
Using the Q&A section is the quickest way to get your questions about a course on Simplilearn answered. However, if the instructor for the paid course has enabled direct messaging, enrolled students can message them by following these steps.
Go to the Messages page (you can also access it via the drop-down menu that appears when you click on your initials or your profile picture at the top right of the page).
Click Compose.
Enter the instructor's name and your message.
Click Submit.
Another way to access messages is to click Overview under the course player, scroll down to the instructor's profile, and click on their name.

faqs.question: How many devices can use Udemy?
faqs.answer:
You can access Udemy courses on multiple devices, such as desktops, laptops, tablets, and mobile phones. There is no limit to the number of devices on which you can access your Udemy course account. 
However, it is important to note that some features may or may not work or may work differently depending on the device or platform's compatibility. For example, you can customize your learning with reminders and use dark mode on the Udemy app. You can also learn anywhere with offline viewing, Chromecast, and AirPlay. Please check which features you want and access the device accordingly.

faqs.question: Q: What is Udemy's Personal Plan? How does it work?

faqs.answer: Several options are available for accessing Udemy's courses based on the learning needs and financial situation of the individual: (1) One-time purchase (Courses On Demand): Courses can be purchased, and lifetime access is granted so that courses can be learned at one's own pace with no time limit. (2) Udemy Personal Plan (Subscription): The user gets unlimited access to thousands of top-rated courses with a monthly or annual payment. The advantage here is that the access lasts only as long as the subscription stays active. (3) Free Udemy Courses: Instructors may offer a few courses free of charge, giving access to just the videos but no certificates or extra services like direct Q&A with the instructor. (4) Udemy Business: This plan is for organizations and offers large teams access to collections of courses for skill development.

admission_process.title: Aptech Computer Education Mumbai Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Aptech Computer Education Mumbai admissionsare merit-based. The institute considers the marks of the candidates in the qualifying exam for admission.Aptech Computer Educationis a global education and training center located in Mumbai under the umbrella head of Aptech Limited. The institute offers technology certification courses for students, graduates or Engineers. Interested candidates can fill out the form and contact the admission office for details.

Admissions at Aptech are open for all courses. Candidates must fulfil the basic requirements to apply for a course at the institute. Below areAptech Computer Education coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Candidates after applying for a course have to pay a fee. The course fee includes all the benefits associated with the programme. Below isAptech Computer Education feesfor all courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
The institute has a variety of courses in technical field. Students can also opt for short-term courses offered by Aptech. Below are the steps to get a seat in the institute:
Step 1:Candidates must fill out the career guidance form on the institute's website. Further, the admission team reaches out to the candidates with further details.
Step 2:The selection to all the courses of Aptech is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam.
Step 3:The admission team notifies the candidates about their selection. Selected aspirants have to pay a fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

courses_data.description: Aptech Computer Education Mumbai offers certificate courses Digital Marketing, MIS Advanced, Data Visualisation, Data Science, etc. Candidates who have completed Class 12 are eligible for ACCP Pro, ACCP Pro E-Commerce, ACWD Pro, NCC Programs. The institute also offers certificate courses to graduates and Engineers. Besides, short-term courses are also available at Aptech Computer Education. The selection is based on merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.answer: Aptech Computer Education Mumbai offers admission to certificate courses based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Further, the admission team notifies the candidates about their selection. Shortlisted aspirants have to pay a fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for certificate courses at Aptech Computer Education, Mumbai?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass a minimum of Class 12 to apply for ACCP Pro, ACCP Pro E-Commerce, ACWD Pro, NCC Programmes. The institute offers other courses to graduates or Engineers. Aptech Computer Education Mumbai also offers Finance & Accounting certificate courses.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to Aptech Computer Education?
faqs.answer: Aptech Computer Education Mumbai admissions are merit-based. The institute considers the merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Candidates must fulfil the course-specific eligibility requirements. Once selected, candidates have to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

faqs.question: Can I apply for admission to Aptech Computer Education, Mumbai with 60% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Aptech Computer Education Mumbai has not specified the minimum eligibility for admission. However,  60% in Class 12 is a decent score. Aspirants with this score can apply for any of the certificate programmes offered by the institute. Aptech Computer Education confirm the admission of the candidates and notifies them the same for further process.

faqs.question: Are admissions open for various courses at Aptech Computer Education, Mumbai?
faqs.answer: Yes, Aptech Computer Education Mumbai admissions are currently open. Candidates are shortlisted for certificate courses based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. The minimum requirement varies course-wise. Aspirants must check the eligibility for the preferred course for admission.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for admission to Aptech Computer Education, Mumbai?
faqs.answer: Aptech Computer Education Mumbai does not accepts or conducts any entrance exam for admission. The selection to all the certificate courses is merit-based. The institute considers the marks of the candidates in the qualifying exam for admission. Further, aspirants have to pay a course fee to complete the admission process.

placement_report.college_name: Aptech Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: Aptech Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Aptech Computer Education has a dedicated placement cell that assists the students in the placement process as well as placing them in major software companies. These major software companies include TCS, Capgemini, Datamatics, Infosys, IBM and Wipro. The college regularly conducts placement workshops to prepare students to face job interviews and crack aptitude test. In total, 188 students were successfully placed from various centres across the country. The highest salary package of Rs 3 LPA was offered by CSC, followed by TCS.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of Aptech Computer Education?
faqs.answer: Aptech Computer Education has excellent relationships with major corporations that frequently employ its graduates. Consider this: TCS, the industry leader in IT services, frequently hires recent graduates from Aptech. These students stand out to them, most likely because Aptech ensures that they are prepared for the technological obstacles that arise in the real world. And lastly, Infosys is yet another well-known IT company. They value the transferable capabilities Aptech gives its students. Aptech appears to be imparting the exact skills that organizations such as Infosys are seeking in prospective employees. Another major player in the tech industry, Wipro, supports employment from Aptech. They appear to be getting precisely that in Aptech—people who know their way around computers. International tech giant Tech Mahindra.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Go for it for additional opportunities.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in our course is 20%. The highest package is 2 to 3 LPA. The recruiting companies are L&T, Tata, Metaroll, and Birla. The percentage of students who got internships in our course is 2–5%. Roles offered in our course include civil engineers.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very big and available in this course, with big halls, classrooms, and libraries. There is Wi-Fi in every department. The quality of food in this college department is very good. Sports and games are conducted when events arrive, and medical facilities are available within 2 minutes.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college is filled with really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: I, Manish Ghule, study at the government Polytechnic College in Aurangabad. I'm pursuing my diploma in civil engineering. After completing this course, many companies, like Ambuja Cement, etc., visit our college for placements or jobs and most of the students, like 30%–50%, get placements and internships from the companies. And mostly, the roles offered by the companies to civil engineering students are site managers, site supervisors, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Faculty members available in college are very nice to students and most of them are teachers. Most of the faculty members are Ph.D.s in the subjects they teach; students are so lucky to have faculty members like them. Our college has a big and very clean lab for studying and also has a library for the books we want. The hostel of our college is also very clean and the college mess is also very nice. Our mess had a plan for every day, like eggs for breakfast with mill, and then we got different vegetables from which more proteins and vitamins could be obtained.

review_content.Placements: The college doesn't have a proper placement cell. It contacts the companies and tries to get some students placed. The highest package is about 3-4 LPA and the least package is 15k INR per month. Seniors do help in getting some contacts but not all of them are well educated. The placements here are not worthy at all.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infra is average with facilities such as classrooms, 1-2 labs, a library with 4-5 computers, etc. There is no hostel in the college. There is a small playground to sit and talk. Sports and games are not good. There is no Wi-Fi and no projector facility in the classes. Washrooms are also not proper. The location is prime but its infra is below average.

review_summary.college_name: Jagannath Institute of Management Sciences, Rohini Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is an average college with good infrastructure, facilities, and placements.

content.Placements: Our college has excellent placements. They provide internships and interview assistance. The highest salary package offered is 15 LPA to 20 LPA. The average salary package offered is 3 LPA to 7 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 1.8 LPA to 3 LPA. Internships are available. Top roles offered are software developer, software tester, and system analyst.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average, and the campus is small. Lab facilities are available. Classrooms are equipped with air-conditioners, whiteboards, and projectors. The library has good collection of books. Our college has three canteens. Bus facility is available. The quality of the food served is average. Medical facilities are available. For sports, we have a small basketball court and a volleyball net. There is a garden on campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Mass Communication (BMC) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am personally not satisfied because I took admission against my parent's wishes.

content.Placements: 0% placement, when it comes to money they make 1000 of promises, but at the end of your course they'll do nothing, no job security. You'll enter in college with so many dreams but come out with shattered dreams by your hands only. I suggest to take admission in good college if you are able to pay money in good amount.
content.Infrastructure: It was okay, its a private college so I don't think so anybody will face any issues in it. Else there is no ground to play or other curriculum activities. Wi-Fi is not available in college, library is available but you are not going to study something that anybody will need of it.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good teachers.

content.Placements: Students must score more than 70% to get placed in our college. The highest salary offered is Rs. 25,000 per month. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, etc. Some students got placed from our college in Decimal Technologies. Top roles offered are MS executive, data analytics, java developer, programmer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides many facilities like computer labs, canteens, IT classrooms, a hostel, etc.
content.Faculty: All teachers are qualified, helpful, and friendly. The course curriculum is not up to date as compared to the industry. Exams are moderate. If you study well, you can pass exams easily.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Mass Communication (BMC) - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because of the overall exposure provided.

content.Placements: The college doesn't have a proper placement cell. It contacts the companies and tries to get some students placed. The highest package is about 3-4 LPA and the least package is 15k INR per month. Seniors do help in getting some contacts but not all of them are well educated. The placements here are not worthy at all.
content.Infrastructure: The infra is average with facilities such as classrooms, 1-2 labs, a library with 4-5 computers, etc. There is no hostel in the college. There is a small playground to sit and talk. Sports and games are not good. There is no Wi-Fi and no projector facility in the classes. Washrooms are also not proper. The location is prime but its infra is below average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Voc. in Interior Design - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Placements are good here, but you need to work for them.

content.Placements: Everyone in the college gets an internship, and around 95% of students are placed. Students were placed in Asian paints and are working with some great architects and are getting industry knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good enough, but the food in the mess is average. The campus is small. You just have very few places to hang out. All you do have is three canteens and no good food in either of them.
content.Faculty: Teachers are kind of good, but rather than focusing on the industry's needs, all they do teach is theory. You will be a bit disappointed by the teaching methods.

reviews.review_text: It was okay, its a private college so I don't think so anybody will face any issues in it. Else there is no ground to play or other curriculum activities. Wi-Fi is not available in college, library is available but you are not going to study something that anybody will need of it.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides many facilities like computer labs, canteens, IT classrooms, a hostel, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of the overall exposure provided.
reviews.review_text: The infra is average with facilities such as classrooms,  1-2 labs, a library with 4-5 computers, etc. There is no hostel in the college. There is a small playground to sit and talk. Sports and games are not good. There is no Wi-Fi and no projector facility in the classes. Washrooms are also not proper. The location is prime but its infra is below average.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are good here, but you need to work for them.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good enough, but the food in the mess is average. The campus is small. You just have very few places to hang out. All you do have is three canteens and no good food in either of them.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with our college and faculty members are very helpful and caring towards every student.
reviews.review_text: Our college has 2 lifts but the only problem is that students are not allowed to use lifts but we use it without permission. I do not live in hostel but I know that the quality of food served in the hostel is too good as one of my friends brings us food from the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Indeed best faculty, good infrastructure, good placements, and they provide good knowledge.
reviews.review_text: To be honest, the facilities and infrastructure that JIMS has are more than good because all classrooms are well air-conditioned. The benches they provide are good and the classrooms are well maintained. In our college, we have three canteens and one of them is the best because it is very similar to fancy cafes. The only drawback that our college has is that we don't have that much big ground or court to play on, but we have cricket nets and a volleyball court which is well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: A well-maintained college with good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good and the canteen is also maintained. The library is also well maintained. Quality of food is also good for sports activities. College also provides facilities to play games but the rules are strict even though, they have a 75% attendance criteria which they should remove asap.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college that has average infrastructure but has good crowd and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is only for the teachers not for the students. Classrooms are clean and they take care of all the required necessities like air-conditioners are working properly and are good in condition. Labs and library are fine. I only faced some problems in the library like sometimes, there is no previous year question paper available. Otherwise, it's okay.

reviews.review_heading: College is good but I want to say that the fees you are paying is not worth it.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okay. We have a separate parking, a badminton court,  2 canteens and Nescafe etc. In each classroom, we have two air conditioners, 1 smart board and 1 projector board. Labs are also very big. In labs, we have 40 to 45 PCs, so that all students can practice.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Delhi.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided are up to the mark. The classrooms are air-conditioned and have projectors, which is very convenient for students. There are 4 canteens here, that have a lot of varieties of foods. Sports like basketball, badminton and table tennis are available.

reviews.review_heading: Best place to start your career.
reviews.review_text: If we talk about infrastructure, the college is almost providing everything like labs, smart air-conditioned classrooms, library, etc. The hostel is also good providing all the facilities. The only thing which is not good here is Wi-Fi setups are not available, and quality food is not served.

reviews.review_heading: It has excellent faculty members with good internships opportunities but bad infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The network connection has no problems, meanwhile, the classrooms are a bit messy and seats aren't up to the mark. Computer labs and library have no complaints. They take 100% care of the medical facilities. There are total 4 canteens and they serve the best food at an affordable price. Its sports week in January that's all for cricket, football, and badminton. Though we can play volleyball and basketball in the college playground as well.

reviews.review_heading: JIMS Sector-3 Rohini is part of a larger educational group named Jagannath Institution.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is pretty good, with excellent classrooms and washrooms. The furniture is very good, and classrooms and libraries are well-ventilated and air-conditioned. They use smart boards in every classroom, and the washrooms are also clean.

reviews.review_heading: Life in JIMS is amazing and worthy of the fees charged by the college for the particular course.
reviews.review_text: The facilities of the Journalism department are good that is more than average. There is no Wi-Fi available but the classes infrastructure is amazing. There are 2 ACs and 5 fans in each class. The library has an enormous number of books and magazines and it is huge. There are radio and tv studios available. Medical facilities are average and almost all main kinds of sports are available like football, basketball, volleyball, etc.

reviews_list.review_title: Know about my college and see what I've shared.

review_content.Placements: I don't think any of the students in this course were placed through the college. They only approached internships and vacant placements and that's the way to get placements at this college that I know. The most offered roles were bankers and many IT professionals, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good according to the fees. Wi-Fi is available in the labs, it is clean and computers are available. Classrooms are good for studying. There is a library which is full of books, both related to the course and outside of the course is also available. Students can sit and study in the library, there are no restrictions.

reviews_list.review_title: The only opportunity to get a relevant degree at hand.

review_content.Placements: Around 300 students join this college every year. It is the only college in the whole district which provides the BCA course at an affordable fee for middle-class students. Salary packages are also quite good. Here you will get the opportunity to work with Accenture, TCs, and many more IT companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities available like labs, library, and classrooms are above average. Our college conducts inter-college sports as well as intra-college sports every year, which allows students to show their extra-curricular activities, be a part of everything and show their excellence.

review_summary.college_name: Sardar Patel Mahavidyalaya ,Chandrapur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: know about Sardar Patel College in Chandrapur.

content.Placements: In my course, most of the students want to pursue their Masters to become more knowledgeable and eligible for good jobs in biotechnology. The average and highest package for the course starts from around 3.5 LPA, and I am not fully aware of the top companies for recruitment. The roles offered to our course students include research and pharmacy in scientist positions, something like research on particular based on medicine, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The structure of the college is at a good level, and the canteen, labs, and libraries are well-facilitated. There are many kinds of books available for studying, and we also have a computer science library for practice. The labs are fully equipped, and Wi-Fi is available in both the labs and the college campus.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My college story with my experience.

content.Placements: I am in my 1st year of BCA so I don't have that much knowledge about the highest and the lowest. I know 20% of students per year get placed in good companies. The average package is around 5-10 LPA. The college also provides internships for students to solve real-world problems.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is only for girls, not for boys so I can't explain. There should be a hostel for boys also. Our department was renovated last month. Now, it is very good for studying. The library is also big. There are two libraries. All books are very well-arranged and they are easy to find.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Computer Application - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Know about my college and see what I've shared.

content.Placements: I don't think any of the students in this course were placed through the college. They only approached internships and vacant placements and that's the way to get placements at this college that I know. The most offered roles were bankers and many IT professionals, etc.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good according to the fees. Wi-Fi is available in the labs, it is clean and computers are available. Classrooms are good for studying. There is a library which is full of books, both related to the course and outside of the course is also available. Students can sit and study in the library, there are no restrictions.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The only opportunity to get a relevant degree at hand.

content.Placements: Around 300 students join this college every year. It is the only college in the whole district which provides the BCA course at an affordable fee for middle-class students. Salary packages are also quite good. Here you will get the opportunity to work with Accenture, TCs, and many more IT companies.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities available like labs, library, and classrooms are above average. Our college conducts inter-college sports as well as intra-college sports every year, which allows students to show their extra-curricular activities, be a part of everything and show their excellence.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Computer Application - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: No Placements and Average Teaching .

content.Placements: If I tell you honestly, in my 3 years of experience, there were no placements at the college. We always try to OFF CAMPUS PLACEMENTS. The college has the worst placements. I have done a B.Com. in computer application from here, and I'm telling you this college is the worst in placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our department is quite good. Wi-Fi, AIR CONDITIONER, GOOD QUALITY PCs available in our labs. But in the case of classrooms, its quite disappointing because the classroom is always very dusty, and we have to clean it every day on our own. And the library of the college is quite good; you can take any book along with you; every book is available there.

outlook.description:
Sardar Patel Mahavidyalaya ,Chandrapur has been ranked well by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Science' category. Through the years, the Outlook-ICARE rankings for Sardar Patel Mahavidyalaya ,Chandrapur indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook-ICARE. It has been seen that in the 'Science' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, Sardar Patel Mahavidyalaya ,Chandrapur's rank is #89, the same as last year's rank in the 'Science' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Arts', the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Sardar Patel Mahavidyalaya ,Chandrapur's rank is #57, the same as last year's rank in the 'Arts' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'BCA' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Sardar Patel Mahavidyalaya ,Chandrapur's rank is #79, the same as last year's rank in the 'BCA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
In the 'Commerce' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Sardar Patel Mahavidyalaya ,Chandrapur's rank is #113, the same as last year's rank in the 'Commerce' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

reviews.review_heading: know about Sardar Patel College in Chandrapur.
reviews.review_text: The structure of the college is at a good level, and the canteen, labs, and libraries are well-facilitated. There are many kinds of books available for studying, and we also have a computer science library for practice. The labs are fully equipped, and Wi-Fi is available in both the labs and the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: My college story with my experience.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is only for girls, not for boys so I can't explain. There should be a hostel for boys also. Our department was renovated last month. Now, it is very good for studying. The library is also big. There are two libraries. All books are very well-arranged and they are easy to find.

reviews.review_heading: Know about my college and see what I've shared.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good according to the fees. Wi-Fi is available in the labs, it is clean and computers are available. Classrooms are good for studying. There is a library which is full of books, both related to the course and outside of the course is also available. Students can sit and study in the library, there are no restrictions.

reviews.review_heading: The only opportunity to get a relevant degree at hand.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available like labs, library, and classrooms are above average. Our college conducts inter-college sports as well as intra-college sports every year, which allows students to show their extra-curricular activities, be a part of everything and show their excellence.

reviews.review_heading: No Placements and Average Teaching .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department is quite good. Wi-Fi, AIR CONDITIONER, GOOD QUALITY PCs available in our labs. But in the case of classrooms, its quite disappointing because the classroom is always very dusty, and we have to clean it every day on our own. And the library of the college is quite good; you can take any book along with you; every book is available there.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has impressive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There's Wi-Fi for the practicals in BCA. The college even has an e-library, so students can browse whatever they want on the web if they don't find suitable information in books. Labs have all the facilities to perform every practical class. Classrooms are good for the fees paid.

reviews.review_heading: College is good for sports and study and also the facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: There is e-library, Wi-Fi, digital classroom, projector screen classroom, well-equipped laboratory, big ground for sports, All sports playing in this college. This is very good for Sports person. Also gymnasium facility are available. Ans band Minton coach and also big Shantaram Potdukhe hall for freshers party, dance competition and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Recommended my friends to join this college for better education and experience.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure are of very good conditions and with updated gadgets. Various kinds of labs are also known like Physics Chemistry bio, computer etc. The library with reading room where you can read anytime in college hrs
Classrooms are also all of good conditions.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I like this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is really good. I have completed my 11th, 12th and graduation in this SP college, but I have never bored with this college because it is best for graduation. You will always get the opportunity to learn new things.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for placements.
reviews.review_text: All the best facilities are provided to students like a big library of study materials, mess facilities and separate girls and boys hostel facilities. Canteens food is very tasty, and sports are very good, and for all sportsmen, there are good facilities. There is a different parking spot for girls and boys.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is really good.
reviews.review_text: When it comes to facilitate the college has it all. From library to labs everything is well maintained. Hostels are clean and food provided is also above average. Thought canteen does not have a lot of food options but still it's good enough to grab a quick snacks. College also has many sports teams which actively participate in events.

reviews.review_heading: Every student get good placement and internship at well reputed companies,curriculum was excellent.
reviews.review_text: Sardar patel college is one of the best college in chandrapur district. It has upgraded it's classrooms to facilitate teaching through modern tools and techniques. The classrooms with Wi-Fi enabled and LCD projectors. The best quality of hostel, quality of food available in mess and canteen, best medical facilities, sports at national level, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for studying.
reviews.review_text: Libraries, study rooms, and classrooms were provided. Wi-Fi facilities were provided. Hygienic canteen facilities and food services were provided. The campus was kept clean and tidy. The temperature of students and faculty members was checked daily at the entrance to take precautions.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best and affordable college in Chandrapur.
reviews.review_text: The campus is so attractive in looks with greenery atmosphere, classroom, lab and library availability. Only girls hostel is provided, whereas boys have to stay outside the campus. Canteen and food facilities are available. The campus holds games and extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Teaching staff members are well knowledgeable here.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities in our college. Wi-Fi facility is also available for extracurricular activities, and there are labs for practicals. The library is also well maintained, and the classrooms are also well maintained. Our college provides hostel only for girls, and a canteen is also available here.

highlights.summary: Singhania University admission 2025 is open for all courses. Interested candidates can apply by visiting the university's official website.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes given at Singhania University include BSc, BTech, MBA, and MCA. SU Jhunjhunu has 200 programmes in more than 50 disciplines, including Engineering, Management, Pharmacy, Law, Education, Humanities, and Science, etc. Singhania University provides hands-on laboratory experience to develop practical skills in education. The university offers a BTech programme in several specialisations, including Computer Science & Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Mining. These BTech programmes are designed for a 4-year duration. Check the flagship programmes given at Singhania University in the given information:
For more information about Singhania University check out the given video:

placements.overview:
Singhania University, Jhunjhunu admission 2025 is open for undergraduate, postgraduate, postgraduate diploma, doctoral, and online programmes. Admission to all of these courses offered by Singhania University is based on merit in the qualifying examination and, in some cases, entrance exams. For specific programmes such as BTech and MBA, admissions are considered on JEE Main and CAT scores, respectively, or university entrance exams.

The university offers these courses primarily as full-time. Aspiring candidates must qualify for the eligibility criteria set by the university for the desired course. Singhania University course admission begins with an online application. Interested students can apply through the Singhania University official website. reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely worth joining.

review_content.Placements: All 100% of students were provided with national and international internship and placement offers with great packages. All students can get dream jobs and guaranteed placement offers in the dream hotels, cruises, and airlines. Also, they have the chance to start their own businesses and have a great future. Scholarships are also available.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a kitchen practice lab, baking and confectionery lab, restaurant, library with lots of books, and computers with internet connection/Wi-Fi for students. We have a computer lab, communication club for enjoyment, lavish classrooms with AC and projectors, canteen, etc. Very clean and tidy campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Fashion and Apparel Design - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: One of best private college for fashion design in Bangalore.

review_content.Placements: The college does provide placement opportunities, and last year's students were placed with different brands. However, the starting salary is usually low, which is typical for freshers in the fashion design field.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure and facilities. It has well-maintained classrooms with AC, a library, a sewing lab, medical facilities, and restrooms. Parking is available. There is no canteen on campus, but there are several food and drink options just outside the gate. The college does not provide hostel facilities, so students must find their own accommodations nearby.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Hotel Management - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied only with placements and faculties.

review_content.Placements: I feel really proud to say that our college provides 100% placement during (part time and odc) and after the course. Also, most of my batchmates have gotten internship in well-reputed 5-star hotels like Shangri-La, Hyatt, etc. My seniors got placed abroad, like in the USA and Poland, with an average salary of 2 lacs, approx.
review_content.Infrastructure: Campus is a bit small but doesn't have a playground or hostel. All classrooms are air conditioned. All labs are too good and well maintained. The library has a good collection of books. The college is built roadside and getting a place for parking is a big task.

overview_faqs.question: What is the semester fee for BCom (Hons) at Singhania University?
overview_faqs.answer: The semester fee for BCom (Hons) at Singhania University is INR 25,000. As there are eight semesters in the programme, the total tuition fee comes up to INR 2 lakh. This is just the tuition fee for the course. Other fee components include the one-time fees, ID card fee, library deposit, hostel fee, mess charges, etc.

overview_faqs.question: What are some helpful tips for students starting their first year at Singhania University?
overview_faqs.answer: Some helpful tips for students starting their first year at Singhania University

overview_faqs.question: What is the tuition fee for BA courses offered at Singhania University?
overview_faqs.answer: The Singhania University fees includes components like the tuition fee, security deposit, hostel fee, mess fee, etc. The tuition fee is payable semester-wise. Singhania University BA tuition fee ranges between INR 39,000 and INR 2.1 Lakh. The exact amount depends upon the candidates' choice of specialisation. It must be noted that this fee is sourced from unofficial sources. It is subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: Why choose Singhania University?
overview_faqs.answer: Singhania University is a private university established in 2007. The university is recognised by UGC and AICTE. It has been approved by the Bar Council of India (BCI) for its Law programmes. Additionally, the university's architecture programmes are accredited by the Council of Architecture (COA).Singhania University courses are available at undergraduate, postgraduate, postgraduate diploma, doctoral, and online levels. In addition to this, Singhania University Distance Education offers in Teaching, Management, Science, IT, and Traditional courses, among others. Singhania University admission is both entrance and merit-based. According to the Singhania University placements, the the highest package and average package stood at INR 11 LPA and INR 6 LPA, respectively.

review_summary.college_name: Singhania University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: UG Diploma in Fashion Design - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good placements, decent campus life, and helpful teachers.

content.Placements: Around 60% of students got placed from my course. The highest package is around 7 LPA, and the average is 4 LPA. Companies like TCS, Infosys, and Wipro recruited from our batch. Many students also got internships in startups and design firms, mostly in roles like designer, analyst, or marketing intern, which are roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure for academics with Wi-Fi, clean classrooms, and well-equipped labs. The library is decent and has most of the required books. Although the college doesn't have a hostel, there are many PGs nearby with average facilities. The campus has a canteen, basic medical facilities, and some sports options.

individual_reviews.course: Professional Diploma in Hotel Management and Catering Science - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: College has good placements and is enjoyable.

content.Placements: About 90% of students are placed in our course. All placements are the same with no differences. Companies like Taj, ITC, Hyatt, Oberoi, and Avasa are involved. Students who have more than 85% attendance get the opportunity to work in five-star hotels. As of now, they are only trainees but have gained good experience in college.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available in college are extraordinary, far beyond what I had imagined. Labs are well-equipped, classrooms are excellent, and quality of facilities for sports and games is really good. Medical facilities are also provided, and food facilities are good as well.

individual_reviews.course: Executive Diploma in Hotel Management and Catering Science - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely worth joining.

content.Placements: All 100% of students were provided with national and international internship and placement offers with great packages. All students can get dream jobs and guaranteed placement offers in the dream hotels, cruises, and airlines. Also, they have the chance to start their own businesses and have a great future. Scholarships are also available.
content.Infrastructure: We have a kitchen practice lab, baking and confectionery lab, restaurant, library with lots of books, and computers with internet connection/Wi-Fi for students. We have a computer lab, communication club for enjoyment, lavish classrooms with AC and projectors, canteen, etc. Very clean and tidy campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Fashion and Apparel Design - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: One of best private college for fashion design in Bangalore.

content.Placements: The college does provide placement opportunities, and last year's students were placed with different brands. However, the starting salary is usually low, which is typical for freshers in the fashion design field.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure and facilities. It has well-maintained classrooms with AC, a library, a sewing lab, medical facilities, and restrooms. Parking is available. There is no canteen on campus, but there are several food and drink options just outside the gate. The college does not provide hostel facilities, so students must find their own accommodations nearby.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Hotel Management - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied only with placements and faculties.

content.Placements: I feel really proud to say that our college provides 100% placement during (part time and odc) and after the course. Also, most of my batchmates have gotten internship in well-reputed 5-star hotels like Shangri-La, Hyatt, etc. My seniors got placed abroad, like in the USA and Poland, with an average salary of 2 lacs, approx.
content.Infrastructure: Campus is a bit small but doesn't have a playground or hostel. All classrooms are air conditioned. All labs are too good and well maintained. The library has a good collection of books. The college is built roadside and getting a place for parking is a big task.

admission_overview.college_name: Singhania University Admission 2025: Courses, Eligibility, Application Process

paragraphs: Singhania University, Jhunjhunu offer admissions online through its official website. It offers various UG, PG, Certificate and PhD programmes in streams like Science, Engineering, Pharmacy, Law, Management, Humanities and Social Sciences, Teaching, etc. Admissions are based on the merit score in the last qualifying exam. There are various PG Diploma, UG Diploma, and Medical courses.

Singhania University admission process is conducted online every year. The university is accepting admissions to various programmes as BSc, B.ed, MA, MSc, and MTech etc. The table below shows popular courses offered by the university their eligibility & fee details:

The fee structure of Singhania University is divided into several components including tuition fee, hostel fee, and one-time fee. The fee components vary based on the course chosen by the students. However, the tuition fee for Singhania University courses typically ranges between INR 8,000 to INR 215,000. Students who are interested in admission to Singhania University courses can contact the admission office to inquire about fee waivers (if available). faqs.question: What score is needed for admission to various courses offered at Singhania University?
faqs.answer: JEE Main for B.Tech and NEET scores for MBBS are compulsory. Whereas, for Ph.D., Singhania University administers its own entrance test. Generally, candidates with valid JRF scores are preferred in the final selection. For UG programs other than B.Tech, admission is based on marks obtained in the latest qualifying degree usually 10+2. The admission criteria may vary based on your category. The minimum required marks may vary from course to course. These details can be found on the official website of Singhania University or in the official brochures. The information on the official website is mostly updated and can be contacted by phone or email.

faqs.question: Can I get a fee refund if I choose to withdraw my admission from Singhania University BA course?
faqs.answer: Yes, Singhania University refunds the fees if a student withdraws/cancels their admission within the stipulated time. The university follows the fee refund policy prescribed by UGC. The fees will be refunded based on the following UGC guidelines: In case of cancellations of admissions/migrations of students up to September 30 of admission year, the university shall make full refund of fees with a deduction of not more than INR 1,000 as a processing fee, up to deadline. For any admission schedule extending/commencing beyond October 31 of admission year, the refund of fees shall be made on following basis: Category Refund Percentage Admission withdrawal notified at least 15 days before the official last date of admission 100% Admission withdrawal notified less than 15 days before the official last date of admission 90% Admission withdrawal notified within 15 days after the official last date of admission 80% Admission withdrawal notified after 15 days but within 30 days after the official last date of admission 50% Admission withdrawal notified over 30 days after the official last date of admission 0%

Yes, Sir Padampat Singhania University (SPSU) in Udaipur offers a 100% scholarship to students who score 95% or higher in 10th and 12th standard, as well as a SPSAT score of 95% or higher.
The university also offers education loans from all nationalized and private banks

It ideally means that you will not have to spend any money on your education, out of your own pocket. These scholarships are also called full- ride scholarships. They are highly competitive scholarships. You must have an exceptional academic record and meet other specific eligibility requirements to land one.

Yes, Singhania University follows a fee refund policy based on the guidelines of UGC. In case a student withdraws/cancels their admission within the stipulated time, their fee will be refunded based on the following guidelines:

Singhania University provides scholarships to the students enrolled on its UG and PG programmes. These scholarships can be availed of by BA students as well. The scholarships are offered under two categories. These categories are listed below:

Additionally, fee concessions are provided to the BA students based on their merit in Class 12. For instance, candidates scoring above 90% in Class 12 are given a fee waiver of 75% of the tuition fee. Candidates scoring 81%-90% in Class 12 are given a fee waiver of 65% of the tuition fee. Lastly, candidates scoring 71%-80% in Class 12 are given a fee waiver of 35% of the tuition fee.

review_summary.college_name: Avinashilingam University Coimbatore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Voc. in Textile Dyeing and Printing - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Actually not that much placements are given by our college.

content.Placements: Above 60% of students got placed. The average salary was Rs 10,000 per month. Zimzon was the recruiting company. 5% of students got internships in printing. Actually, this is a great college to study for a small amount of money. Studying in this college is good with a small amount of money to invest in studies and no more coming for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Actually, it was a great infrastructure and also had great labs. It provided super food sometimes. There was great infrastructure. We had a great library. We study in the evening in library. There was a good auditorium. There was super food in the canteen. There were clean restrooms.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Rural Development and Sociology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Really Good infrastructure and facilities to learn.

content.Placements: This course provided opportunities for most of students to be placed in government organizations, NGOs, government departments, etc. It provided internship opportunities to gain field-level experience in district administration through the District Collectorate, rural administration through Panchayats, and social work through collaboration with various best-running NGOs.
content.Infrastructure: The campus was clean and eco-friendly, with adequate classrooms and labs. Department-specific resources like rural development models, maps, and survey tools were available. The library was well-stocked with rural studies, development theory, and sociological texts. The quality of food was somewhat good. A medical room and doctors were also available to treat any sick students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Zoology - Batch of 2026

content.Infrastructure: Whichever course you opt for they have heights laboratories and infrastructure with all the facilities in all the course. Wi-Fi is available for research purposes and libraries have a wide range collection of books. It has a peaceful environment for studying.

admission_process.title: Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women admission is open for all the courses. Admission to all the UG and PG courses is entrance-based. Applicants can apply for the course of their choice online on the university's official website.Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Womenoffers many courses under UG, PG, and doctoral levels under various streams, such as Arts, Science, and Humanities. All the information related to the Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women admission 2024 is available in the following segments:

Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women admission to all the courses is entrance-based. The college offers various UG, PG and PhD courses. Candidates seeking admission to any courses at Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria and appear for the selection process accepted by the college. The basic eligibility for UG is to passClass 10 and Class 12from a recognised board and pass UG and PG degrees for admission to PG and PhD courses, respectively. Check out the table below for Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women courses, along with their eligibility and selection:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Pass Class 12 from a recognised board
Pass graduation degree
Class 12 from a recognised board
Check here to know more aboutAvinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women courses

Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women admission process begins with filling out the registration form. Applicants seeking admission to any courses must appear for the entrance exam accepted by the university. Want to know complete details about the Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women admission process 2025, go through the following section.
Step 1: Application Process

Applicants looking forward to admission to various programmes at Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women must fill up the admission form online by visiting the official website of the college. Application forms cannot be submitted without uploading the required documents.
Step 2: Selection Round

According to the selection criteria, the applicants must have passed Class 12 for admission to UG and a graduation degree for admission to PG. Additionally, for all the courses, applicants must appear for the entrance exam accepted by the university and score well. The university releases the shortlisted candidates’ list for all the courses based on their scores in entrance exams.
Step 3: Final Seat Confirmation
Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women will release a merit list of the selected applicants for all courses for the final seat allotment.
Step 4: Admission Confirmation
The selected applicants must make theAvinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women feepayment within the given deadline to secure their seats.

faqs.question: Can I join Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women without entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Admission to a majority of postgraduate and integrated postgraduate level courses at Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women is subject to CUET UG and CUET PG exams. Further, for MBA, university accepts various entrance exam scores, such as MAT/CMAT/CAT/XAT/TANCET/ATMA. In addition to this, candidates are required to fill out the basic eligiblity criteria set by the college. Candidates seeking admission to Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women can apply for these exams and then apply to the university with a valid score.

faqs.question: What is the step-by-step admission process of Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women?
faqs.answer: Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women admission is carried out in online mode. The university offers various at UG, PG and PhD courses. The university offers both merit and entrance-based admission. Here is the step-by-step admissions process for the Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women:Step 1: Application ProcessThe eligible candidates need to apply online on the official website of their respective entrance i.e CUET-UG and CUET-PG. Further, candidates are also required to visit university official website to fill out the application form.Step 2: Selection ProcessAdmission to the courses is both merit andentrance-based. The institute has a predefined selection process for shortlisting aspirants. The selection process includes an entrance exam for admission to BTech, MSc, BCom, MBA, MA and others. Further, for other courses university offers merit-based admission.Step 3: Admission ConfirmationAfter candidates get sh

The entrance exam includes CUET, MAT/CMAT/CAT/XAT/TANCET/ATMA. Additionaly, the university offers merit-based admission to other courses. Candidates are required to apply to the official website of their respective entrance exam and visit the university offlicial website to fill out the admission form.

paragraphs: Over 102 companies visited the institute campus during the 2023 placements. The total count of offers made to the 2023 batch of BTech , MBA , MA , and other courses was 936 . The overall highest package offered during Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women placements 2023 was INR 9.50 LPA and the lowest package stood at INR 2.50 LPA .

The institute has a Career Guidance and Placement Cell that organises various training, placement and internship activities. The cell first understands the students' interest towards higher education, seeking jobs and interest towards competitive exams. Over 120 hours of exclusive competitive exam training is provided to 70 students, who have registered for SSC Exams.

nirf.description:
Avinashilingam has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Avinashilingam's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Avinashilingam fell 1 rank to #99 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

hostel_campus.college_name: Avinashilingam University Coimbatore Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Actually not that much placements are given by our college.
reviews.review_text: Actually, it was a great infrastructure and also had great labs. It provided super food sometimes. There was great infrastructure. We had a great library. We study in the evening in library. There was a good auditorium. There was super food in the canteen. There were clean restrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Really Good infrastructure and facilities to learn.
reviews.review_text: The campus was clean and eco-friendly, with adequate classrooms and labs. Department-specific resources like rural development models, maps, and survey tools were available. The library was well-stocked with rural studies, development theory, and sociological texts. The quality of food was somewhat good. A medical room and doctors were also available to treat any sick students.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the institution.
reviews.review_text: Whichever course you opt for they have heights laboratories and infrastructure with all the facilities in all the course. Wi-Fi is available for research purposes and libraries have a wide range collection of books. It has a peaceful environment for studying.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available are good like Wi-Fi connectivity, classrooms, drinking water facilities, library, canteen, a vast volume of books, learning materials, etc. Food quality is good in the canteen and also in the mess of hostel. The medical room is available. There is also a sick room on campus for taking rest. Sports and games are well-supported and encouraged here.

reviews.review_heading: The title of the review is Rabika.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in my college were excellent, including Wi-Fi, classrooms, and a library, all accessible to every student. The food quality in my college was superb and delicious. However, medical facilities were not available on campus. Sports and games facilities were provided.

reviews.review_heading: The college is strict in terms of dress code, the faculty is okay, but the placements are average.
reviews.review_text: There are psychology labs for doing practicals. Classrooms are spacious, and the library is okay. In terms of the quality of food, in the mess it was not good, but the quality of food in the canteen is good. Medical facilities are there, like one doctor who comes in the evening. There are no proper sports facilities given to students who are not players.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in my classroom and library were very good; everything is available in my college. The quality of food made in my canteen was so good. Medical and games as well as sports facilities are available for the students in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women in M.Sc. Botany in 2025.
reviews.review_text: In this college, many facilities are provided like Fast Wi-Fi Connection, Clean Bathroom, Available Multiple Branches in Classroom, every student has a computer in Labs, Library, etc. Facilities are provided by the college. This college has a sports committee and gym khana committee that organises every year games and sports tournaments for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Best college and environment is very well.
reviews.review_text: The environment of the college is very beautiful, well decorated, and pleasant. There are well-equipped classrooms, a large library, and some auditorium rooms. Apart from this, students have separate classrooms for teaching practice. There is no hostel facility here, but rooms are available nearby at very low cost.

reviews.review_heading: Really good teachers, placements and infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connection is available, as is the biggest library, comfortable lab facilities, and high-tech classrooms. We have clinic our college campus. The NCC candidates put the independence day parade in New Delhi. Football, volleyball, etc. are played here. The infrastructure is very good.

reviews.review_heading: A perfect college for women with great infrastructure and faculty members in Tamil Nadu.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were really in good condition. We had lights and fans in all the classrooms. The benches were well-furnished too. We have a smart board for PPT presentations. We have a department library for our course.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women.
reviews.review_text: Very poor hostel and some good infrastructure. The hostel is very strict and students are not allowed to do anything without the consent of their parents. Outside foods are strictly not allowed in our college hostel. A vegetarian meal is provided for hostellers and they conduct prayer every morning .

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and highly knowledgeable teachers.
reviews.review_text: We have labs for all subjects, each highly equipped with new instruments. Our classrooms can accommodate up to 50 students and feature digital boards that facilitate understanding through visual examples.

reviews.review_heading: Best place for girls to equip themselves with excellent skills and knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Excellent facilities and a learning environment are worth the effort. Hostel food was okay (only vegetarian meals). Laboratories and classrooms were well maintained and cleaned. Sports were given ample importance and the infrastructure was just awesome. In addition, the facility at NCC is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. Computer labs are available. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Smart boards and projectors are available in classrooms. The library is kept up-to-date. They provide newspapers daily. We need an ID card to scan the barcode to borrow a book from the library. Sports and games are considered the most important. The hostel facilities are good. The quality of the food in the hostel is good.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty and college.

review_content.Placements: We were total 60 students in our 2018 batch. We paid the highest fee of 10k each year. There was no recruitment for our Interior Designing Department. All of us got internship from our course. Many students got offered as a junior interior designer or As a intern after pass-out Diploma.
review_content.Infrastructure: We didn't has Wi-Fi, but had a big computer lab for software courses. We had very good labs, classrooms and library. All facilities in our hostel was good. We enjoyed our hostel life. College provides us scholarships for better future. Our hostel has a large ground for gym and games.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: Around 15% of students were placed out of 70. The highest salary package offered was 4.5 LPA and the lowest salary package was 2.5 LPA. The recruiting company was L&T. Internships were not provided in our college due to the pandemic. Junior engineer role was offered to students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college had better infrastructure like labs, etc. Wi-Fi was not available. All classrooms were the best. The library was the best with all types of field books. Hostel facilities were the best but the food served was not good. Sports and games were the best in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: College faculty is very good.

review_content.Placements: Minimum 50% of students will be placed and others will go for its higher qualification. The highest package is 350000 LPA, the average package is 250000 LPA and the lowest package is 150000. Recruiting companies are Bajaj, Infosys, Larsen & Tourbo, Tata Motors, Bosch, etc. 30% of students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, laboratories (Science, Physics), classrooms, library, workshop. The hostel facility is very good and the security is very good. The food quality is the best. Medical facilities are available and sports such as cricket, kabaddi, kho-kho, are available.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Government college of Diploma in Nashik (Samangaon).

content.Placements: Our college placement is average; only 1 and 2 companies are placed in our college. But education is the best. In this college, the cutoff is very high. The computer and IT branch cutoff is above 95. This year, last semester, we had internships at our colleges. The degree subject average is most important for admission to the degree.
content.Infrastructure: Our college department is very curious. Labs and classrooms are big and huge. Hostels are also huge. Our college courses are expendable. And practical also here. The hostel cutoff depends on the result of the semester. Our college courses and hostels are huge and affordable.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The students here are all meritorious and competitive. So it's enjoyable to be part of the college.

content.Placements: In our branch, one company visited the campus named Thought Works and 4-5 students were selected. It was mandatory to complete a 6-month internship for all students. If you're from the non-tech branch, then placement opportunities are quite good, and some of the students from the non-tech branch also got stipends during their internships.
content.Infrastructure: The college's infrastructure is quite old and Hardware and Microprocessor's laboratories PC's are not in working condition. The hostel was good and affordable. The food was not that good. All facilities like water purifiers, etc. was provided by the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty and college.

content.Placements: We were total 60 students in our 2018 batch. We paid the highest fee of 10k each year. There was no recruitment for our Interior Designing Department. All of us got internship from our course. Many students got offered as a junior interior designer or As a intern after pass-out Diploma.
content.Infrastructure: We didn't has Wi-Fi, but had a big computer lab for software courses. We had very good labs, classrooms and library. All facilities in our hostel was good. We enjoyed our hostel life. College provides us scholarships for better future. Our hostel has a large ground for gym and games.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Around 15% of students were placed out of 70. The highest salary package offered was 4.5 LPA and the lowest salary package was 2.5 LPA. The recruiting company was L&T. Internships were not provided in our college due to the pandemic. Junior engineer role was offered to students.
content.Infrastructure: Our college had better infrastructure like labs, etc. Wi-Fi was not available. All classrooms were the best. The library was the best with all types of field books. Hostel facilities were the best but the food served was not good. Sports and games were the best in our college.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: College faculty is very good.

content.Placements: Minimum 50% of students will be placed and others will go for its higher qualification. The highest package is 350000 LPA, the average package is 250000 LPA and the lowest package is 150000. Recruiting companies are Bajaj, Infosys, Larsen & Tourbo, Tata Motors, Bosch, etc. 30% of students.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, laboratories (Science, Physics), classrooms, library, workshop. The hostel facility is very good and the security is very good. The food quality is the best. Medical facilities are available and sports such as cricket, kabaddi, kho-kho, are available.

highlights.summary:
A few updates on NIELIT Delhi are as follows:

The Union Minister of Electronics and Information Technology, Mr Ashwini Vaishnaw, officially launched the NIELIT Digital University (NDU) in New Delhi. It will offer industry-specific courses in fields such as AI, Data Science, Cybersecurity, and Semiconductors. He also inaugurated five new NIELIT centres across different Indian states.

college_info.intro:
NIELIT Delhi offers long term certificate courses in IT and Electronics field for various levels such as DOEACC 'O', DOEACC 'A', CHM 'A' and 'O' level and Multimedia and Animation Technology 'O' Level. NIELIT Inderlok offers short term/ industrial training/ diploma courses in Digital Marketing, Web Designing, Web Developer, Computer Application Accounting and Publishing Assistant and various other IT, Electronics, Multimedia and Digital Literacy courses. Furthermore, NIELIT Delhi courses list also includes various Summer Training programmes, UG and PG Diplomas etc. The Institute gives admission through online and offline mode. NIELIT Delhi centre fee structure offers these courses within INR 1.2 K to INR 45 K tuition fees.
For more details about courses of National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Delhi check out the below video:
Find below the latest information around NIELIT Delhi popular courses, along with other courses:

faqs.question: Where do NIELIT Delhi alumni work?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, the institute has an online placement portal which is free for registration by the NIELIT qualifiers. The institute then presents these details to the employers to create employment. The NIELIT Delhi placement portal slo facilitates prospective companies to examine and shortlist resumes based on needs and skill sets. Subsequently, the portal shall be scaled to permit non-NIELIT qualifiers to submit their details along with a reasonable fee towards placement efforts by the institute.
faqs.question: Does NIELIT Delhi offer campus placements?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: NIELIT Delhi offers long-term and short-term programmes in the fields of Information Technology, Electronics and Multimedia. It offers CISCO Certified CCNA and CCENT programmes. NIELIT Delhi courses list has UG Diploma, PG Diploma, DOEACC O Level, A Level, Summer Training programmes and various others. The Institute offers these courses within the fee structure of INR 1.2 K - INR 45 K of tuition fees. Apart from this, the Institute offers these courses with minimum charges of application fees. Furthermore, NIELIT Delhi admission is based on merit and entrance exam. Candidates must qualify Class 12 with a minimum aggregate of 50% to be eligible for majority of courses. To learn more, check out the NIELIT Delhi courses along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:    National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Delhi accepts scores of JEE MAINS Entrance exams. JEE MAINS is India's most taken and accepted engineering entrance test taken by NTA. A score of 250 and above is considered good for 85 to 95 percentile which can get a student admission into various engineering colleges. NIELIT Delhi's last year cut-off was rank-based. The opening rank was near 40000 and closing ranged to above 1 lakh. If a student secures the 90-95 percentile, they can easily get admission to NIELIT. The cut-off can vary in coming years depending on the average score.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Delhi for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    The cost of pursuing courses at NIELIT Delhi varies depending on the specific programme and the level of study. For certificate courses, the fees typically range from INR 1.18K to 19K, offering a budget-friendly option for those seeking specialised skills. For the DOEACC O Level program, which includes 2 courses and spans one year, the fees generally fall between INR 20.8K to 25K. Additionally, for UG Diploma courses, comprising 2 options, the fees range from INR 18.05K to 22K. These fee structures make NIELIT Delhi a relatively affordable choice for students looking to enhance their technical and computer-related skills, with various options to suit their budget and career goals.
faqs.question: Is studying at NIELIT Delhi expensive?

faqs.answer: A:    The National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Delhi offers various courses at the present undergraduate level. The fees for UG Diploma courses vary from INR 18k to 22k. The O-level courses provided by the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Delhi vary from INR 20k to 25k. Being government-affiliated institution, the fee structure is affordable.
faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Delhi?

faqs.answer: A:    Supposedly if under unforeseen circumstances you fail an internal exam, you don't have to worry because you will be getting an option to reappear for the exam and give a retest. A candidate must submit a new application through the TP and pay the necessary exam cost to be considered for the same position. Such cases would be arranged in conjunction with the upcoming primary exam, which would take place at the exam site or any other nearby center. The whole authority to schedule such tests while taking their budgetary sustainability into account belongs to RC. Usually, scheduling an exam takes 30-45 days.
