faqs.answer: National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT) Delhi doesn't hold entrance exams; admission depends on course-specific criteria. Cut-off schedules don't apply. For courses with qualifying exams, cut-off marks follow opening and closing ranks after admissions. NIT Delhi JEE Mains cutoff 2023 relies on these ranks, and NIT Delhi GATE cutoff for ST category considers GATE exam scores.
faqs.question: Q: What is the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology delhi cut off schedule?

faqs.answer: In March 2000, NIELIT, New Delhi, was established. It is a center that is expertly run and has a solid track record. It is an IT corporation with well-defined strategies, and all of its operations are focused on providing its clients with a full range of IT goods and solutions. It has demonstrated its capacity to deliver high-quality computer education and manage significant projects for governmental organizations across several industries. The Center began operations as a branch office of the Chandigarh Center for NIELIT. Since 1 November 2012, it has been an NIELIT independent center under the supervision of centers. The center has made great strides in the execution of numerous turnkey IT Projects, including the computerization of numerous hospitals and different government offices in Delhi, PSUs, and autonomous organizations of government.The main goal of the NIELIT Centre in Delhi is to develop skilled labor in the fields of electronics, computer science, information technology, and other related subjects in order to produce professionals who are ready for the workplace and to advance e-learning.
faqs.question: Q: What is unique about NIELIT Delhi?

faqs.answer: National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Delhi accepts scores of JEE MAINS Entrance exams. JEE MAINS is India's most taken and accepted engineering entrance test taken by NTA. A score of 250 and above is considered good for 85 to 95 percentile which can get a student admission into various engineering colleges. NIELIT Delhi's last year cut-off was rank-based. The opening rank was near 40000 and closing ranged to above 1 lakh. If a student secures the 90-95 percentile, they can easily get admission to NIELIT. The cut-off can vary in coming years depending on the average score.
faqs.question: Q: What entrance exam scores are accepted by National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Delhi for admission?

faqs.answer: O Level Course is a government foundation course for a degree in computer science. Before it was known as DOEACC, NIELIT (National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology) supplied the affiliation for O-Level courses. All applicants for the "O" Level computing course must have successfully completed their 10 + 2 coursework in any stream, according to the eligibility requirements.

content.Placements: There is a huge scope for placements. Lots of students get their placements in different multinational companies of the information technology industry. Students of not only my branch, but other branches are also getting regular placements. Last year also, the placement percentage was above 90%.
content.Infrastructure: The entire college is spread across many acres of area. The buildings are renovated at regular intervals of time. All the buildings are of high quality which is very good. The campus has many sports grounds also, like a basketball court, volleyball court, etc. It also has a swimming pool.

individual_reviews.course: NIELIT-'A' Level (IT) (After ‘O’ Level) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: The college has really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: The placements are good. The reputed companies visit the campus. The salary depends on the education and experience of the student, but minimum salary offered was not below than Rs. 18,000 per month and salary also depends on job profile just like an assistant programmer, website developer, and network administrator. You have to achieve a good grade in your diploma for a better job.
content.Infrastructure: There are five labs and four classrooms on the campus. The labs and classrooms are very clean and good. There is also a library. The college is on the second floor of the mall of Inderlok metro station. I didn't like the shops near the college because there are two wine shops on the ground floor of the mall.

admission_overview.college_name: NIELIT Delhi Admission 2025: Courses, Application, Dates, Eligibility

paragraphs: NIELIT Delhi admissionto the short-term courses (also known as certificate courses) is based on merit and qualifying exam score. Students need to complete the admission process to get a seat at the institute for the desired programme. The application process generally commences online, however, students may apply offline after confirming with the centre. Further, admission to long-term programmes such as NIELIT O level, A Level and CHM O level is done basis of the NIELIT exam and eligibility criteria as prescribed by the institute.NIELIT Delhioffers over eighty courses at various levels. Read the following article to learn all about theNational Institute of Electronics and Information Technology, Delhi.

NIELIT Delhi course admission is done on the basis of pre-decided admission criteria. The institute offers a multitude of programmes in full-time mode. TheO-levelandA-levelcourses are equivalent to the Foundation and Advanced Diploma, respectively. Admission to O/ A/ B level courses is done based on the NIELIT entrance exam. Below areNIELIT Delhi coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Eligibility Criteria

The total tuition fees for the courses offered at NIELIT Delhi vary depending on several factors, such as programme, specialisation, and category of the students. It generally ranges between INR 10,000 and INR 45,000. Students need to pay the fees as per the institute's guidelines. Students belonging to the SC/ ST category need not pay any course fees as per the government's norms. Check out the table below to learn about the course-wiseNIELET Delhi fees:
Note: This information is taken from official sources and is subject to change.

NIELIT Delhi admission procedure includes several steps. The process starts with checking the admission criteria followed by registering oneself. Registered students are then shortlisted based on the course-specific selection criteria, such as on merit/ entrance basis. The institute offers a limited number of seats. Only those who meet the admission requirements are selected. Interested candidates can follow the steps mentioned below to completeNIELIT Delhi admission process:
Step 1: Register Yourself

Aspirants meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online for the course of their choice. Aspirants need to fill out the Online Examination Application Form. Candidates need to pay an application fee of INR 500 for an O/ A level course. The application fee is INR 1,000 + 12% GST for General and other candidates (INR 500 + 12%) for SC/ ST candidates.
STEP 2: Selection

NIELIT shortlists candidates for admission to the short-term, PG diploma programme based on merit in the last qualifying exam. NIELIT conducts an entrance exam to select candidates for non-formal courses. The institute evaluates the application form of the candidates for admission.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Once the candidates are informed about their selection, they need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat.

faqs.answer: NIELIT Delhi is a Co-Lead Centre for the implementation of one of the technologies Social and Mobile.The number of seats reserved for people with disabilities is limited to 3% and is included in the roster for reservation of SC/ST/OBC categories. Seats are reserved as per Government of India Rules and Guidelines, AICTE and/or Dr. B.A.M. University approval.Admission is based on JEE Mains & JOSAA. For B.Tech. II Year (Lateral Entry subject to availability of vacant seats) to be done by NIELIT Aurangabad. Keep visiting their website for updates.Foreign nationals may apply for admission to B.Tech course subject to fulfilling the minimum eligibility requirements through proper channel. Their application will, however, be considered separately on first come first serve basis and the total seats are 09.

placement_data.title: NIELIT Delhi Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Delhi placement report has not been released for the batch passing out in 2024. It will be updated here as and when released by the institute. As per the Shiksha students' reviews, the placement rate recorded in recent drives was above 90% . Further, the lowest package stood at INR 18,000 per month . The list of top recruiters who participated during the recent NIELIT Delhi placement process included ABB Ltd., Accenture, Bank of Baroda, Capgemini, HCL Technologies , and many others.

faqs.question: Which are the top companies that take part of the placement drive at NIELIT Delhi?
faqs.answer: NIELIT Delhi has a 90% confirmed placement rate. It has one of the most reliable placement drives. Some top companies visit the institution during placement rounds which include Infosys, HP, and TCS. Other major companies are Cipla, Bank of Baroda, Agrata Technologies, Bamo Electronics, ERAM Technologies, ACCEL Technologies, HCL Technologies, Bhushan Steels, and MRF tyres. Many reputed companies collaborate with the institute. The lowest placements present have ever been INR 18,000 per month.

faqs.question: Is studying at NIELIT Delhi expensive?
faqs.answer: The cost of pursuing courses at NIELIT Delhi varies depending on the specific programme and the level of study. For certificate courses, the fees typically range from INR 1.18K to 19K, offering a budget-friendly option for those seeking specialised skills. For the DOEACC O Level program, which includes 2 courses and spans one year, the fees generally fall between INR 20.8K to 25K. Additionally, for UG Diploma courses, comprising 2 options, the fees range from INR 18.05K to 22K. These fee structures make NIELIT Delhi a relatively affordable choice for students looking to enhance their technical and computer-related skills, with various options to suit their budget and career goals.

faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Delhi?
faqs.answer: The National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Delhi offers various courses at the present undergraduate level. The fees for UG Diploma courses vary from INR 18k to 22k. The O-level courses provided by the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Delhi vary from INR 20k to 25k. Being government-affiliated institution, the fee structure is affordable.

data.description: NIELIT has currently 04 Boy's hostels functioning in the campus, built based on contemporary architecture. The hostels are named after the "Industrial Professional Hostel (IP Hostel), P.G. Hostel, Swami Vivekananda B.Tech. Hostel and Diploma Hostel Each of these hostel-blocks has well-ventilated rooms designed to accommodate students on shared occupancy basis. The hostel rooms are furnished with cots, study-tables, chairs, cupboards and bookshelves, enabling comfortable stay and to ensure a learning conducive environment. Each floor has common washrooms with modern sanitation facilities. Hygiene and cleanliness of the rooms, floors and surroundings are taken care of by routine house-keeping services.

faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

reviews_list.review_title: The campus life is not good.

review_content.Placements: I am in the 2024-2027 BCA AI batch. According to my seniors, the placement in the university is not good with an average package of around 2 LPA. There is no official placement data available. The university runs a paid internship program with Wipro, which costs around Rs. 3,500.
review_content.Infrastructure: In the hostel, the Wi-Fi facilities does not work, and the water quality is poor, causing hair fall. The food in the hostel is not good. Vegetarian and non-vegetarian food is served in the same place, which is difficult for pure vegetarian students. There are not many sports facilities, only basketball and volleyball, and the staff is not cooperative.

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: Om Sterling Global University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It's almost good but not many qualified teachers are there in my batch.

content.Placements: Anyone can get placed here according to their ability, with average packages depending on the course chosen. Internship opportunities based on the course, skills pursued, and level of expertise in that field.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure facilities are good, there are labs, Wi-Fi, and classrooms that are almost good. They also provide us with a library in which all books are available. The hostel facilities are good, and the food is almost good, not so good, but okay. The canteen is also okay.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, they help you in your stream, and if you have any doubt, you may take it from your teachers. Not all teachers are skilled here, but some of them are skilled and have good knowledge about their subject. Semester exams are not very difficult, if you study well, then they seem easy.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors in Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Our university has good infrastructure. It is a well-developed university.

content.Placements: Our university has good placements. We get good offers from top companies in our university. The fee is Rs. 65,000 per year. The highest fee is Rs. 95,000 per year with the hostel and university fees.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in our university. It has good classrooms. Hostel rooms also have AC and fans. It has good food. All facilities are available in the hostel with well-prepared rooms. There are attached bathrooms and rooms also with AC. In our university, the lowest package of BPT with the hostel is Rs. 95,000 per year.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The campus life is not good.

content.Placements: I am in the 2024-2027 BCA AI batch. According to my seniors, the placement in the university is not good with an average package of around 2 LPA. There is no official placement data available. The university runs a paid internship program with Wipro, which costs around Rs. 3,500.
content.Infrastructure: In the hostel, the Wi-Fi facilities does not work, and the water quality is poor, causing hair fall. The food in the hostel is not good. Vegetarian and non-vegetarian food is served in the same place, which is difficult for pure vegetarian students. There are not many sports facilities, only basketball and volleyball, and the staff is not cooperative.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Radiography and Imaging Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Search for some other university instead of this.

content.Placements: Jindal Industries and hospital are major recruiters at university. University says go and search for internships. They will add this in degree and many students are not placed. They fail in exams so they are not able to sit in placement sessions.
content.Infrastructure: Executive facilities are there. Labs are best. Our campus has great environment with greenery everywhere. There are labs available at university. Students are allowed to practice in lab. Canteen is a big problem at university and is not good. There are no food shops available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Radiography and Imaging Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Om Sterling Global University.

content.Placements: Placements are not very common here. Students have to do internships in their 4th semester, but many students are not offered any placements. The highest salary offered is Rs.. 1,20,000 per month. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 30,000 per month. About 80% of students got placed in the radiology course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of Om Sterling Global University is very good, but most of the departments in the university are nearly 15 years old. But now all the departments are being renovated. The department of technology has been newly made, providing good classrooms, labs, offices, and a library.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

hostel_campus.college_name: Om Sterling Global University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It's almost good but not many qualified teachers are there in my batch.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure facilities are good, there are labs, Wi-Fi, and classrooms that are almost good. They also provide us with a library in which all books are available. The hostel facilities are good, and the food is almost good, not so good, but okay. The canteen is also okay.

reviews.review_heading: Our university has good infrastructure. It is a well-developed university.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in our university. It has good classrooms. Hostel rooms also have AC and fans. It has good food. All facilities are available in the hostel with well-prepared rooms. There are attached bathrooms and rooms also with AC. In our university, the lowest package of BPT with the hostel is Rs. 95,000 per year.

reviews.review_heading: The campus life is not good.
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, the Wi-Fi facilities does not work, and the water quality is poor, causing hair fall. The food in the hostel is not good. Vegetarian and non-vegetarian food is served in the same place, which is difficult for pure vegetarian students. There are not many sports facilities, only basketball and volleyball, and the staff is not cooperative.

reviews.review_heading: Search for some other university instead of this.
reviews.review_text: Executive facilities are there. Labs are best. Our campus has great environment with greenery everywhere. There are labs available at university. Students are allowed to practice in lab. Canteen is a big problem at university and is not good. There are no food shops available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Om Sterling Global University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Om Sterling Global University is very good, but most of the departments in the university are nearly 15 years old. But now all the departments are being renovated. The department of technology has been newly made, providing good classrooms, labs, offices, and a library.

reviews.review_heading: All about Om Sterling Global University.
reviews.review_text: The university provides various facilities like a computer lab, physics lab, science lab, and various workshops for carpentry, electrical, and civil engineering. Also, auditorium, canteen, and men's sports facilities like a basketball court, volleyball court, football ground, and cricket ground. The hostels are fully Wi-Fi enabled with a mess and washing machines.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is fair, and the surroundings are beautiful.
reviews.review_text: There is a library in my course where we get books to read. There is a moot court where we practice law, and we sometimes go to the main auditoriums to participate in debates and presentations. Wi-Fi is available, though no phones are allowed during lectures, and we have many classrooms that cater to many students. The hostel is fair, not so bad. It has a refreshing environment, allowing students to go to the gym at their free times. However, due to a lack of air conditioning, it might be very h...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty, good placements in 2024, really good.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, library, and Wi-Fi facilities are available in this college. The university offers good quality hostels, food, mess, canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games, all of which are fine with me.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Om Sterling Global University.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure. The campus has lush greenery. The campus is spread over 20 acres. Labs are well maintained. Wi-Fi speed is good.

reviews.review_heading: If you are good enough to get placed in top IT companies then join here immediately
reviews.review_text:
Best rooms with a.c are available and all sanitary facilities are available. Classrooms have white and green board as well as projector embedded for teaching purposes.
All teachers are nice and awesome, they are recognised as the face of the university and they are quite knowledgeable.

reviews.review_heading: A comprehensive review of OM Sterling global university.
reviews.review_text:
There is a good environment for study. Classroom with projector, WIFI in the library and good staff. Hostel is very nice. Three living room rate is INR 60,000 per year. 
Wi-Fi facility and in winters warm water is available. Food is average in the hostel. Canteen is there inside the campus. In sports, university is very poor. I want to say there are no sports.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for MBA courses and it also provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: This college is good for students. All facilities are available in our college. Wi-Fi is also available. Laboratory is better. Classrooms are well-maintained. The library is decent. A playground is also available. Hostel rooms are better. Our campus life is very good.

reviews.review_heading: OSGU is not a good university.
reviews.review_text: There are projectors in our classrooms for better understanding. There is a library with almost all the books. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is average. The quality of food in our mess is average.

reviews.review_heading: Make your career with this university.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in my course is good. The classroom size is very big according to the student strength. There are many labs. The size of labs are big. The Wi-Fi are also available. There are not very big library. But all books are available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. The quality of the hostel and mess is not good. Sports and games are available in our college.

highlights.summary: Watch out this space for the latest news around Bhanwar Rathore Design Studio (BRDS) Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the Certificate level, Bhanwar Rathore Design Studio (BRDS) offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ) and Design. College offers Certificate courses at the Certificate level.

reviews_list.batch_info: Certificate in Fashion Design - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: A great place for learning designing.

review_content.Placements: At our institute all the students get placements. Average package offered in this course was 2-6 LPA. Many companies visits our college for the placements such as Kazo, Orient craft etc. Top roles offered in our course were fashion designers, assistant designers etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the institute was good. Students were offered all types of types of facilities here. Institute classrooms were big and having all the stuff. No hostel facility was offered at the institute. Canteen was located in the campus providing food at reasonable prices.

reviews_list.batch_info: Certificate in Interior Design - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the faculty and curriculum provided throughout the course, as well as the location.

review_content.Placements: 50% chance is there that you get placement opportunities, but recruiting companies don't come for campus placements. The package is less because it's an internship, and you won't get an internship easily because there is less demand for new interior designers because everybody wants to experience it, whether you apply for a job or new clients.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classes are well-equipped with the materials that are needed to teach students interior design. There is also Wi-Fi and a computer to practise on and ask any queries. Also, faculty members are supportive. They also provide field trips to showrooms and give information about materials.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Right place for a bright career.

review_content.Placements: According to College Deep, the placement of students is one hundred percent, but according to me, only 16% of students got placed in good company. The highest package is 46 Lacs. Whereas the average package is 3 to 4 Lacs in the course. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, HCL, and Sectra, and there was fewer opportunities for internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is there, labs are there, classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and there is a library. The canteen is also good. The food in the hostel is average, and the facilities are good. Various sports and games are held regularly.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good college to study and enjoy colldge life fully.

review_content.Placements: Placement rate is high and packages are good. There were many recruiters including Bajaj Finance, Amazon and Flipkart. Many of my friends got a chance for internships and are fully satisfied.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms were nice and tidy, there were many labs, an e-classroom specifically for some remote class from the teacher that were teaching in the college remotely through webniars etc. Library had the most good environment, we always got together here to complete our notes.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers were good and helping, curriculum was more theory and was simple and straightforward, the exams were not that difficult and retests were conducted so everybody passes the exam, the teaching quality was average, teachers wanted students to ask questions .

overview_faqs.question: Can Amritsar Group of Colleges be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Amritsar Group of Colleges is a reputed institute for UG Diploma, MCA, B.A., B.Tech, BBA, B.Com, BCA, D.Pharma, B.Com LL.B, LL.B., B.A. LL.B., B.Sc., B.Pharma, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in IT & Software, Mass Communication & Media, Engineering, Business & Management Studies, Accounting & Commerce, Medicine & Health Sciences, Law, Science, Hospitality & Travel, Design. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Amritsar Group of Colleges has a review rating of 3.7 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.8 on campuslife, 3.3 on placements, 3.8 on faculty and 3.8 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Amritsar Group of Colleges Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Is ACET value for money?

content.Placements: There are 22 students in our batch among which 2 of us got placed in a local company. The average package is about 3.75 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Wipro, Khanna Paper Mill, Luminous, Ericsson, etc. We are offered engineer role in the company we got selected.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel building is quite new and semi-furnished. Maximum room capacity is 4. Wi-Fi is available for each two rooms and is quite slow. The food is vegetarian and no non-vegetarian food is available in the hostel. Cricket and football tournaments are organized every semester.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Agriculture - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty members, placements, and infrastructure.

content.Placements: 75% of students got placed. The highest package is 6.5 LPA. The lowest salary is 3.5 LPA. Recruiting company is Supple Tek. 70.75% of students got internships. There are many roles like you can be a teacher after completing M.Sc. Many students got placements in Supple Tek. Many students get higher and lower positions according to their eligibility basis. There are many courses available in the college. Many students got paced in many industries like fertilizer industry like Supple Tek company which exports the price in one country to another. You can take admission there if you want. Many students get placements from the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Right place for a bright career.

content.Placements: According to College Deep, the placement of students is one hundred percent, but according to me, only 16% of students got placed in good company. The highest package is 46 Lacs. Whereas the average package is 3 to 4 Lacs in the course. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, HCL, and Sectra, and there was fewer opportunities for internships.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is there, labs are there, classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and there is a library. The canteen is also good. The food in the hostel is average, and the facilities are good. Various sports and games are held regularly.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good college to study and enjoy colldge life fully.

content.Placements: Placement rate is high and packages are good. There were many recruiters including Bajaj Finance, Amazon and Flipkart. Many of my friends got a chance for internships and are fully satisfied.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms were nice and tidy, there were many labs, an e-classroom specifically for some remote class from the teacher that were teaching in the college remotely through webniars etc. Library had the most good environment, we always got together here to complete our notes.
content.Faculty: Teachers were good and helping, curriculum was more theory and was simple and straightforward, the exams were not that difficult and retests were conducted so everybody passes the exam, the teaching quality was average, teachers wanted students to ask questions .

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A college with good facilities and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Almost 90% of students get placements. The highest salary package offered is 42 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Capgemini, Wipro, TCS, and many more. There are several roles offered as per companies' requirements and students skills. Training and internships are also provided.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in our college like Wi-Fi, all kinds of labs, E-classrooms, a library with wide collections of books, a seminar hall, an auditorium, a canteen, and many more. The hostel has great infrastructure and provides healthy food. Many tournaments are held in the hostel.

hostel_campus.college_name: Amritsar Group of Colleges Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
AGC has a home away from home for those students who come from various other countries, states and city outskirts providing them the best amenities to make them feel at home. The students develop a sense of responsibility and learn to manage their life independently staying in hostels. They also develop qualities such as solidarity and comradeship having gained rich experience living in the hostels. AGC is currently having two boys’ hostels (International Hostel and Sardar Patel Boys' Hostel) and one girls’ hostel (Kalpana Chawla Girls’ hostel).

Salient features of AGC Hostels

• Fully furnished and spacious ventilated rooms accommodating single/two/three/four students in each room.
• Separate residential facility for boys and girls within the campus.
• Air-conditioned and standard rooms (equipped with desert Air-coolers) available in boys and girls hostels.
• Well-furnished dining rooms accommodating more than 400 students at a time.
• Hygienic food made under the strict supervision of hostel authorities.
• RO mineral water facility round the clock.
• Hot water available in winter season.
• 24/7 power availability.
• Study room, TV room, Cafeteria, Gymnasium facility available.
• Outdoor and indoor games facility.
• Wi-Fi facility available round the clock.
• Fully secured and comfortable housing facility to all the inmates.
• Ragging – free environment.
• Personal care and regular counseling.
• First-aid facility.
• Health care and regular visits of registered physicians in the hostels.
• Bus facility available for hostel students.

library.description:
The Central Library of Amritsar Group of Colleges, since its commencement in May 2002, in AGC’s Amritsar College of Engineering & Technology (ACET) campus; has been on the road of development on a daily basis. The library houses in 625 sq. ft. area of the College campus and consists of an adequately rich collection of books and works of literature, rich with the collection of over 67,500 books.
In addition, a digital library is the part of the main central library and has access to 22 computers and more than 400 non-printed materials for the fulfillment of the requirement of the students. Highlights of the library in the Amritsar Group of Colleges’ ACET campus: Centrally Air Conditioned, Reading room, Competitive Exam Section, Wi-Fi Facility, Digital Library. E-Journals (IEEE Access and 195 from DELNET) and Reprographic Facility.

The library has a seating capacity of about 100 students at a time. It also has a separate reading hall. Moreover, the library includes various sections such as periodical section- subscribing more than 15 National and International journals in print foam and 200 E-Journals (National and International) by DELNET; and in the circulation section we are continuously available from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM for the issue and return of the books.
Library follows the “Browne charging system” for the circulation, where in 3 tickets are issued to each student and all the college employees are entitled to get 4 books issued.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Tennis Court, Play Ground, Volley Ball Court

cafeteria.description: The college has its own cafeteria and the department of Hotel Management & Catering Technology, ACET started a restaurant named as “ACET Swagatam” and a bakery named “ACET Bake Studio”

hostel.description:
AGC has a home away from home for those students who come from various other countries, states and city outskirts providing them the best amenities to make them feel at home. The students develop a sense of responsibility and learn to manage their life independently staying in hostels. They also develop qualities such as solidarity and comradeship having gained rich experience living in the hostels. AGC is currently having two boys’ hostels (International Hostel and Sardar Patel Boys' Hostel) and one girls’ hostel (Kalpana Chawla Girls’ hostel).

Salient features of AGC Hostels

• Fully furnished and spacious ventilated rooms accommodating single/two/three/four students in each room.
• Separate residential facility for boys and girls within the campus.
• Air-conditioned and standard rooms (equipped with desert Air-coolers) available in boys and girls hostels.
• Well-furnished dining rooms accommodating more than 400 students at a time.
• Hygienic food made under the strict supervision of hostel authorities.
• RO mineral water facility round the clock.
• Hot water available in winter season.
• 24/7 power availability.
• Study room, TV room, Cafeteria, Gymnasium facility available.
• Outdoor and indoor games facility.
• Wi-Fi facility available round the clock.
• Fully secured and comfortable housing facility to all the inmates.
• Ragging – free environment.
• Personal care and regular counseling.
• First-aid facility.
• Health care and regular visits of registered physicians in the hostels.
• Bus facility available for hostel students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Amritsar College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 23 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Is ACET value for money?
reviews.review_text: Hostel building is quite new and semi-furnished. Maximum room capacity is 4. Wi-Fi is available for each two rooms and is quite slow. The food is vegetarian and no non-vegetarian food is available in the hostel. Cricket and football tournaments are organized every semester.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members, placements, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and library are well-managed. Infrastructure is also good. Fresh food and medical facilities are well. There are canteen and mess on the campus. A playground is also available on the campus. Fast food is also available in the canteen and many varieties of food are available.

reviews.review_heading: Right place for a bright career.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is there, labs are there, classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and there is a library. The canteen is also good. The food in the hostel is average, and the facilities are good. Various sports and games are held regularly.

reviews.review_heading: Good college to study and enjoy colldge life fully.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms were nice and tidy, there were many labs, an e-classroom specifically for some remote class from the teacher that were teaching in the college remotely through webniars etc. Library had the most good environment, we always got together here to complete our notes.

reviews.review_heading: A college with good facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in our college like Wi-Fi, all kinds of labs, E-classrooms, a library with wide collections of books, a seminar hall, an auditorium, a canteen, and many more. The hostel has great infrastructure and provides healthy food. Many tournaments are held in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Amritsar Group of Colleges.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, well-equipped labs, and a comprehensive library for its courses. Hostel facilities generally include Wi-Fi, basic accommodation, and a secure environment, with messes serving a variety of hygienic meals. Sports, medical facilities, etc., are there.

reviews.review_heading: Encouraging in extracurricular.
reviews.review_text: The labs , library, classrooms and other infrastructure are still in good  but the campus is not that much big . So the college's infrastructure is good , but in the case of hostels , mess can be a problem but not at all, as the food provided is edible as compared to other hostels or PGs around the area.

reviews.review_heading: It's an autonomous college with NAAC grade A.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and many computer labs are available for students. Library facilities are also available, and a decent quantity of books are available for students. The mess food quality is very average, and three meals are provided.

reviews.review_heading: It is an autonomous college with NBA accreditation.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty decent. There are many computer labs available for BCA and CSE students. Hostel facilities are also available, and the quality of food is average, like in every college. Sports facilities are also available, and the college organizes tournaments every year for cricket, football, badminton, and kabaddi.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is very supportive and qualified. Not so good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The faculty is good, and the infrastructure is also good. The hostel is good but too small, with only a single mess for two wings. It also does not offer many indoor or outdoor games or activities on a regular basis. Classrooms do not offer Wi-Fi. The campus has a library and labs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Amritsar College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 5 Mar 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Best decision of my life was getting admission here.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were good, and the infrastructure of the college was well-constructed. Rooms, labs, and library were also well-established. Wi-Fi speed was good for download and upload. Hostel facilities were also available. The food quality of the hostel and canteen was tasty and healthy. The sports ground was also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Amritsar College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 3 Mar 2024)
reviews.review_heading: College had top quality faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure for the CSE course. Our course department has a separate building in which all the necessary facilities like Wi-Fi, computer labs, library, classrooms, projectors, etc., are offered. The college also has its own hostel for the college students, which is located near to the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Amritsar Group of Colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Labs have good devices for performing practicals. The machinery is the latest and in good condition. The hostel consists of about 500 rooms, which are semi-furnished, with some of the rooms having air-conditioning facilities. The hostel mess is clean, but they provide only vegetarian food.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. There is a central library with air-conditioners 24 hours to study and daily newspapers are available. All classrooms are air-conditioned and have PPT service. Mess food quality is not good but it is better than hotel food.

reviews.review_heading: College is Awesome for Pharmacy .
reviews.review_text: AC classroom are available for students and AC libraries are available for reading and books regarding your course and subjects. The mess food quality is not well, but it is acceptable. It is not like home, but you can survive from this food and medicine are available.

paragraphs: Admission at Leonardi da Vinci School of Design are both merit and entrance-based as per the course. Students are offered programmes at UG, PG, Certificate and Doctorate level. These courses are offered in full time mode. To get admission inLeonardi da Vinci School of Design, students must meet the eligibility. The applications are accepted online. Some of the accepted entrance tests include DAT, ISC, and Maharashtra HSC, and more. For merit-based admissions, scores in last qualifying exam are the criteria. college_info.college_name: Indian School of Business Management and Administration, Hyderabad: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Indian School of Business Management and Administration, Hyderabad, is located in Hyderabad, Telangana. Established in 1992, it is a private institute. Indian School of Business Management and Administration, Hyderabad provides 140 UG, PG and Certificate courses in 35 specialisations, namely Auditing & Control, Business Economics, Business Law, Chartered Accountancy and Civil Engineering. Theses programmes are offered in Part Time mode. MBA/PGDM, Executive MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., MCA and BCA are some of the courses offered at Indian School of Business Management and Administration, Hyderabad. Some of the streams in which these courses are offered include Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Mass Communication & Media and Law. The total fee at Indian School of Business Management and Administration, Hyderabad ranges between INR 3,500 to 1,04,880. Indian School of Business Management and Administration, Hyderabad offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

review_content.Placements: All the top companies across industries such as FMCG, IT, consulting, etc., visit the campus for placements. In our batch, almost everyone got placed by the end of the session. I don't remember the exact placement percentage. The lowest salary package offered was 12 LPA, and the highest went up to 1 crore per annum. The given MBA programme in ISB has students with different work experiences, so the placements are a combination of previous experience and ISB profile. Companies such as McKinsey, BCG, Pahul, Coke, IBM, Novartis, Walmart, Deloitte, Cargill, Luxottica, Dalberg, etc., visited the campus for placements.

paragraphs: Indian School of Business Management and Administration, Hyderabad admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG, PG, After 10th, Certificate and Doctorate levels in streams includingEngineering, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Mass Communication and Media, Law, Humanities and Social Sciences, Hospitality and Travel, Aviation, Banking and Finance and Insurance.Indian School of Business Management and Administration, Hyderabadadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asTSBIE, CBSE 10th, and CBSE 12th. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.

Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 3,500 - 1,04,880for UG, PG, After 10th, Certificate and Doctorate level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 months - 3 years.

highlights.summary:
As per the NIRF 2025 rankings, IIT Mandi ranks #26 under the category 'Engineering'.

The GATE 2026 exam for admission to ME/MTech and PhD courses has concluded. Results are scheduled for release on Mar 19, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

Use your JEE Main 2022 Rank and Predict the Colleges you are eligible for, using Shiksha's JEE Main Rank and College Predictor. Get cut-off information for 600+ colleges and 2500+ colleges

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at IIT Mandi include BTech and MTech. Admissions to UG & PG courses is based on national-level entrance exams, candidates need to visit the official website of various conducting bodies to fill out the application form and pay the required application fee online. IIT Mandi offers a full-time BTech in nine specialisations. These specialisations include Engineering Physics, Microelectronics & VLSI, Computer Science and Engineering, etc. The duration of these courses is four years, further divided into eight semesters. Additionally, the institute also offers an integrated BTech + MTech in Bioengineering. The duration of the dual-degree programme is five years.
The most sought after BTech specialisations at IIT Mandi include Computer Science, Computational Science, Electronics and Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Data Science, among others. IIT Mandi graduates are placed in eminent organisations such as Amazon, Micorsoft, Infosys, etc.
On the other hand, some of the popular MTech specialisations offered are Mechanical Engineering, Biotechnology, VLSI, Structural Engineering, etc. Admission to MTech at IIT Mandi is through GATE followed by COAP counselling. Some of the IIT Mandi popular programmes are given below:
For more information about IIT mandi popular programmes check out the below videos:

review_summary.college_name: IIT Mandi Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Mathematics and Computing - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It's very good and satisfactory, the scenic beauty of the mountains and nature is fabulous.

content.Placements: The mathematics and computing course at IIT Mandi was started in 2023. The placement for the branch has not started yet but the internship of our seniors is very good with most of them securing internships. Some secured internships for the SDE role while others got trading or finance-related roles. Some interned in AI-ML, and some joined the research sector according to their interests. Some companies that have hired interns include Microsoft, Sprinkler, Adobe, Goldman Sachs, and Boconni University's Quant Finance, among others.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus provides good classroom, library and labs facility with very pretty scenic view of the mountains, Wi-Fi facility is very good in labs and library but not that good overall, sports facilities are good but mostly in the South campus so there is problem of up down from one campus to another but have many facilities in North campus also, mess food is decent and campus have decent amount of canteens not much, medical facilities provided is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: The highest package was 65 LPA last year, and the average is around 27 LPA for my branch. Nearly 90 percent+ got placed last year. Top recruiting companies are Google, Amazon, Nvidia, Flipkart, etc. The same percentage of students got internships, and those were in Google, LibreOffice, etc.
content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi, but it is not optimized to work for Windows, and we have a lot of problems connecting Windows to the Wi-Fi. Classrooms are well structured. The library is also well built and has great facilities. Food in the hostel is sometimes good and sometimes not. Medical facilities are provided for free, and we have a sports complex and a large ground on the campus for most sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Great package, but a small campus.

content.Placements: 100 percent of students have been placed in the computer science course. The highest package is 90 LPA, the lowest is 17 LPA, and the average is 30 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Google, Microsoft, and Adobe. Nearly 80 percent of the batch got an internship by 3rd year in companies like Microsoft and Samsung. Top roles offered are SWE and product manager.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure available is great, but less compared to the number of students. Hostel infrastructure and cleanliness are great, but rooms are a bit cramped, the mess food is sometimes good and sometimes very bad. Sports (especially badminton) facilities are great. Medical facilities are also up to date.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: College is situated in the foothills of Himalayas and provides so much positivity.

content.Placements: It has been 100 percent placement this year. CSE has an average package greater than 29 LPA. The highest package has been around 1 CPA, and the lowest is around 15 LPA. Companies like FAANG, MAANG, and top HFTs have come to our campus. Placement is so awesome, but apparently we have to work hard too.
content.Infrastructure: Department of each branch has huge infrastructure and labs worth 1.5 crores. Everywhere in the campus there is availability of Wi-Fi facilities. Hostels are good, but due to increasing seats, the space might become congested. Mess provides decent food, but it can be worse.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Very strong placements with a peaceful lifestyle in the mountains of the Himalayas.

content.Placements: Almost 95 percent of the total students participating in placements are placed, and it is 100 percent for CSE branch. In CSE, the highest package is 80 LPA, and average was 29 LPA, with the lowest being 6 LPA. Top recruiters were Amazon, Adobe, Infosys, HCL, Microsoft, Mahindra, JP Morgan, Samsung, Tata Motors and TCS. On-campus internship was done by 41% students
content.Infrastructure: There are every possible facilities available in our course, but only thing that may be troublesome for some students is the 4 sharing rooms for 1st year students. Mess food quality also decreased after a couple of months, but is restored upon complaint to the dean's office.

admission_overview.college_name: IIT Mandi Admission 2026: Cutoff, Dates, Fees, Eligibility, Selection Criteria, Cutoff

admission_overview.title: IIT Mandi Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Ranked at #26 by NIRF 2025 under the category 'Engineering', IIT Mandi is one of the top Engineering institutes of the country. IIT Mandi admission is mainly entrance-based. The institute accepts national-level exams, such as JEE Main, JEE Advanced, GATE, and respective counselling rounds to shortlist students. Aspirants will have to submit the applications at the respective entrance exam conducting bodies' official website. IIT Mandi offers over 30 courses at the UG, PG and doctoral levels. These are offered in the fields of Engineering & Technology, Science, Arts, and more. Interested students can go through the following sections to know about the eligibility and admission process for Indian Institute of Technology Mandi.

eligibility_selection.title: IIT Mandi Eligibility & Selection Process 2026
eligibility_selection.description:
IIT Mandi is one of the eighth newer second-generation IITs. It is a research university now, and It has been involved with many Research and Development (R&D) projects. The institute delivers education through its nine schools including Bioscience and Bioengineering, Computing & Electrical Engineering, Chemical Sciences and Management.
IIT Mandi course admission is subject to fulfilment of the preset admission criteria. The institute offers admission to several Integrated BTech & MTech in Bioengineering (Dual Degree) programmes. Students must meet both the basic eligibility and clear the selection rounds to get admission. The selection is based on entrance exam + counselling/ interview. Find below the IIT Mandi courses along with the admission requirements:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 pass with 75% aggregate in PCM from a recognised board
courses_table.selection_criteria: JEE Main + JEE Advanced + JoSAA Counselling

courses_table.eligibility: Bachelor's degree in Engineering/ Technology or MSc or MCA from a recognised university
Master’s degree from a recognised university
courses_table.selection_criteria: GATE/ CSIR- NET JRF/UGC-NET/ Written Test + Personal Interview

faqs.answer: Students have to meet the IIT Mandi course eligibility to get admission in the institute. The selection process is entrance-based. The common minimum eligibility is as below:IIT Mandi UG eligibility - Class 12 with relevant subjects + minimum of 75% aggregateIIT Mandi PG eligibility - UG degree in relevant fieldIIT Mandi PhD eligibility - PG degree in relevant field
faqs.question: Who is eligible for IIT Mandi admission?

faqs.answer: Yes, students can get admission in IIT Mandi without JEE exam. But this is not applicable for the flagship BTech programme. For BTech admission at any IIT, students have to appear for JEE Main + Advanced exams. However, for the other programmes, such as MBA, MTech, BSc, etc., other exams are accepted.
faqs.question: Can I get admission in IIT Mandi without JEE exam?

faqs.answer: Yes, students can get admission in IIT Mandi with a rank of 10000 in JEE Advanced. But at this rank, admission to the top specialisations, such as CSE would not be possible. Students can get admission in Mechanical Engineering, General Engineering, Engineering Physics, and more. Interested students can go through the past year cutoff records to know more.
faqs.question: Can I get admission in IIT Mandi with 10000 rank in JEE Advanced?

faqs.answer: No, it's not easy to get admission in IIT Mandi. Students have to meet the basic eligibility and get really good scores in accepted tests. The competition is high. With IIT Mandi being one of the top Engineering institutes of the country, the cutoff is high too. But, with right planning, students can get a seat at the institute.
faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission in IIT Mandi?

paragraphs: IIT Mandi admission processincludes the application process, selection round,cutoff, merit list and counselling. The application and selection process varies for different programmes at the institute. Selection to the majority of the programmes isentrance-based, but few courses, such asMAadmissionare done based onmerit,written tests, andpersonal interviews. The step-wise admission process for IIT Mandi courses is given below:
IIT Mandi Application Process

Students need to complete the application form for the course-specific entrance exam. After the results are out, students have to apply for the counselling process. For MA, BS, BS-MS and MBA admissions, students can go to the institute's site. The application has to be submitted with documents & fees.
IIT Mandi Selection Rounds
At IIT Mandi, students are selected mainly on an entrance basis. Students have to clear all the selection rounds to get admission. The selection process is as below:

For the MTech courses, theGATE score is exemptedfor candidates if they graduating/graduated from IITs with a BTechdegree and have a CGPA (cumulative grade point average) of8.0 (on a scale of 10) are exempted from the GATE score.
Release of Cutoff list, Counselling & Admission Confirmation

TheIIT Mandi cutofffor BTech and MTech courses is released by the respective counselling bodies. For admissions based on in-house entrance exams, the institute releases the course-wise merit list. As per the merit list, students are called for counselling for seat allotment. Shortlisted students must pay theIIT Mandi admission feesto complete the process.

TheIIT Mandi fees structurefor UG & PG courses consists of different components. These include aone-time fee, tuition fee,medicalcover, campus facilities,transportationandhostel fee. The lowest tuition fee for IIT Mandi courses is INR 40,000, whereas the highest fees goes up to INR 8.1 lakh.

Coming to affordability is one of the major factors why many students leave their college-level studies. While the availability of financial aid and student loans have made education accessible the eligibility needed to qualify for a loan or scholarship often becomes difficult. headings.text: How can I prepare for admission to IIT Mandi?

lists: IIT Mandi UG Admission:IIT Mandi admits students to BTech courses based on JEE Main and JEE Advanced candidate's scores. Candidates are allotted seats in JoSAA Counselling for BTech, BTech-MTech (Dual Degree) and BS courses.

IIT Mandi PG Admission:Admission to MTech is through GATE + COAP Counselling. The institute has its in-house exam for MA admission. Candidates can check with the admission office for the selection rounds of the rest of the courses.
Cross-check section-wise weightage & syllabus for all subjects covered in JEE Main
Refer to a few reference books
Solve as many Mock Tests as possible. Shiksha.com is providing aFREEDownloadable JEE Main Mock Test Paper (with Solutions).
Solve previous year’sJEE question papers; there are high chances of getting questions from there
Keep your focus on NCERT books at this point

These includeComputer Science and Engineering, Power Electronics and Drives,Structural Engineering, and more. The course is divided into four semesters. Admission toMTech at IIT Mandiis through GATE, followed byCOAP counselling. In case, students who have graduated from IITs with a BTech degree and have aCGPA of 8.0(on a scale of 10)do not needto appear for theGATEentrance examination, fora few specialisations. They can apply directly on the official website of the institute.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for M.Tech at IIT Mandi?
faqs.answer: For admission to IIT Mandi MTech, you need Bachelor's degree in Engineering/ Technology or MSc or MCA with at least 60% aggregate in the relevant discipline from a recognised university. In addition, applicants with BE/ AMIE exam scores can also apply.

faqs.question: What is the hostel fee for IIT Mandi?
faqs.answer: Students who get the hostel facility have to pay for the hostel charges, which include various one-time and semester-wise payable components such as Mess Fee, Medical Fee, Hostel Amenities Fund, etc. Find below the IIT Mandi hostel fee for various courses:Course NameHostel FeesBTechINR 76,800MBAINR 38,400MTechINR 57,600MAINR 38,400MScINR 38,400Note:The fee structure for all courses is for the batch of 2022.Disclaimer:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is

faqs.question: How to get a seat in MSc at IIT Mandi?
faqs.answer: Aspirants must meet the eligibility conditions as prescribed by the institute and qualifying exam conducting body. IIT Mandi shortlists students for MSc based on their scores in theIIT JAMentrance exam. Further, the shortlisted candidates are called forCCMN Counselling. At the time of counselling, seat allotment is carried out on the basis of exam score, seat intake, reservation policy, and cut-off.

faqs.question: How many seats are there in IIT Mandi?
faqs.answer: The total seats available across varied courses (excluding MA, PhD, and Certificate) sums up to nearly 666. Seat allotment for each course is carried out in accordance with the seat intake. Moreover, statutory and legally mandated reservations will be followed as per Government of India orders from time to time.

The PhD programme is offered through all nine schools specialised in different streams including Management, Mechanical and Materials Engineering, and Civil & Environmental Engineering. Other than these, a PhD is also available inCentre Artificial Intelligence and Robotics(CAIR), andas anIntegrated programme. Admission to the courses is throughGATE/ UGC-NET/ CSIR-NET/ Written Test, followed by apersonal interviewround. Check out the following table for more details aboutIIT Mandi PhD admission:

faqs.question: Is GATE compulsory for PhD in IIT Mandi?
faqs.answer: No,GATEis not compulsory and is only one of the criteria for admission. Aspirants with a valid UGC NET/CSIR NET can also apply. Candidates without any valid national-level exam score can also appear for the written test conducted by the institute.

faqs.question: What PhD courses are offered in IIT Mandi?
faqs.answer: The institute offersPhD coursesin the streams of Engineering, Science, Humanities & Social Sciences. These courses are offered in multiple specialisations, including Mechanical Design, Fluid Thermal, Manufacturing, Materials Engineering, Atmospheric Science, Electrical Engineering, etc. Admission to all these programmes is entrance-based.

faqs.question: What is JEE Main 2025 application form date for admission to IIT Mandi?
faqs.answer: IIT Mandi offers admission to BTech is based on JEE Main exam score. To get admission candidates are required to apply on the offlicial website of JEE Main. The NTA will release the JEE Main application form 2025 tentatively in November. The exact JEE Main 2025 registration date will be notified soon. As the JEE Mains 2025 exam will be conducted in two sessions, NTA will release separate application forms for both January and April session.

faqs.question: What are the courses that IIT Mandi offers?
faqs.answer: The institute offers over 30 courses in the streams of Engineering, Humanities & Social Sciences, Science, IT & Software. The UG/PG courses offered by the institute are BTech,  MTech,  BS,  MA, etc. In addition, PhD and certificate courses are also offered. IIT Mandi offers courses in full-time and part-time modes, as well as online courses.

faqs.question: How can I prepare for BTech admission at IIT Mandi?
faqs.answer: To qualify JEE Main exam, an advanced and well-planned study plan is required. A good preparation strategy can help students in securing a seat for the BTech course at IIT Mandi. Below are the pointers that can help students in the preparations for JEE Main entrance exam:Revise topics section-wiseCross-check section-wise weightage & syllabus for all subjects covered in JEE MainRefer to a few reference booksSolve as many Mock Tests as possible. Shiksha.com is providingFREEDownloadable JEE Main Mock Test Paper (with Solutions).Solve previous year’sJEE question papersthere are high chances of getting questions from thereKeep your focus on NCERT books at this pointTo secure admission into prestigious institutions such as the IITs, NITs and IIITs, it is essential for the aspirants to have a strong command on the material taught in their class 11 and class 12. Shiksha is offering free NCERT questions and solutions to aid JEE candidates in excelling in these classes. To access the NCERT solut

faqs.question: What is the admission process for IIT Mandi?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to apply through the application window of the course-specific entrance exam. Candidates seeking admission to PhD or MA can apply directly on the IIT Mandi official website (iitmandi.ac.in). The application process for some of the popular courses is further as follows:For BTech, candidates must register on the official websites of the National Testing Agency (nta.ac.in). Then, candidates must apply for JEE Main and JEE Advanced, followed by JoSAA counselling for BTech courses.For M.Tech courses, candidates must register on the official websites of GOAPS (gate.iitk.ac.in).

faqs.question: How to get admission in M.Tech at IIT Mandi?
faqs.answer: Aspirants with a valid bachelor’s degree in the relevant specialisation are eligible to apply for the PG course. Admission to M.Tech at IIT Mandi is based on merit inGATEfollowed byCOAP counselling. Candidates with a score equal to more than the cutoff become eligible to participate in the counselling round. In addition, IIT graduates with an 8.0 CGPA or above are exempted from the GATE score requirement and can apply directly.

placement_data.title: IIT Mandi Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: A total of 215 recruiters visited IIT Mandi campus in 2025 for BTech placements and placed 95.04% of the BTech Class 2025 in new-age job roles. The average package offered to BTech CSE students during IIT Mandi placements in 2024 stood at INR 29.33 LPA . Further, the overall average and median package offered to BTech students during IIT Mandi placements in 2025 was INR 21.64 LPA and INR 17 LPA. The top recruiters of IIT Mandi in 2025 included Infosys, Microsoft, Amazon, HCL, IBM, TCS, ICICI Bank, etc. The highest and average package received during IIT Mandi placement 2025 for MBA program stood at INR 39 LPA and INR 16 LPA . Analytics was the top recruiting domain during the placement drive 2025.

IIT Mandi has a Career and Placement Cell (CnP cell) that helps in shaping the careers of students from their induction and orientation, summer internships, mid-term projects, right to their final placements, and even beyond. CRC also undertakes various academic and non-academic initiatives so that students are well-equipped to meet varied industry requirements.

As per the latest report, 192 recruiters visited IIT Mandi in 2024 and placed 84% of the BTech Class 2024 in new-age job roles. The average package offered to BTech CSE students during IIT Mandi placements in 2024 stood at INR 26.55 LPA . Further, the overall median package offered to BTech students during IIT Mandi placements in 2024 stood at INR 21 LPA.

Earlier, the Phase 1 of IIT Mandi placements 2023 concluded with 249 job offers . As per the media reports, 201 recruiters participated during IIT Mandi placements 2023 and presented 90 international offers and 75 PPOs to the batch 2023. The highest and average package offered during IIT Mandi placements in 2023 was INR 60 LPA and INR 25.23 LPA, respectively. The top recruiters of IIT Mandi in 2023 included Infosys, Microsoft, Amazon, HCL, IBM, TCS , ICICI Bank , etc.
Download: IIT Mandi Placement Report 2024

As per NIRF 2025, the ranking of the institute is #58 in the Overall category, #26 under Engineering, and #10 under Innovation. The institute is ranked as one of the best institutes for its top class faculty. The article mentioned in this space covers all the details you need if you are interested in IIT Mandi rankings.

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, IIT Mandi has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown an increasing trend. In 2025, IIT Mandi climbed 14 ranks to #58 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Engineering', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, IIT Mandi climbed 5 ranks to #26 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It has been observed that the institute has shown a decreasing trend in the 'Innovation' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, IIT Mandi fell 2 ranks to #10 rank in the 'Innovation' category by the NIRF ranking.
Discover the latest rankings and categories provided by other ranking bodies listed below.

qs_world.description:
IIT Mandi has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend. In 2026, IIT Mandi fell 73 ranks to #564 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, IIT Mandi fell 16 ranks to #152 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

reviews.review_heading: It's very good and satisfactory, the scenic beauty of the mountains and nature is fabulous.
reviews.review_text: Our campus provides good classroom, library and labs facility with very pretty scenic view of the mountains, Wi-Fi facility is very good in labs and library but not that good overall, sports facilities are good but mostly in the South campus so there is problem of up down from one campus to another but have many facilities in North campus also, mess food is decent and campus have decent amount of canteens not much, medical facilities provided is good.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi, but it is not optimized to work for Windows, and we have a lot of problems connecting Windows to the Wi-Fi. Classrooms are well structured. The library is also well built and has great facilities. Food in the hostel is sometimes good and sometimes not. Medical facilities are provided for free, and we have a sports complex and a large ground on the campus for most sports.

reviews.review_heading: Great package, but a small campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure available is great, but less compared to the number of students. Hostel infrastructure and cleanliness are great, but rooms are a bit cramped, the mess food is sometimes good and sometimes very bad. Sports (especially badminton) facilities are great. Medical facilities are also up to date.

reviews.review_heading: College is situated in the foothills of Himalayas and provides so much positivity.
reviews.review_text: Department of each branch has huge infrastructure and labs worth 1.5 crores. Everywhere in the campus there is availability of Wi-Fi facilities. Hostels are good, but due to increasing seats, the space might become congested. Mess provides decent food, but it can be worse.

reviews.review_heading: Very strong placements with a peaceful lifestyle in the mountains of the Himalayas.
reviews.review_text: There are every possible facilities available in our course, but only thing that may be troublesome for some students is the 4 sharing rooms for 1st year students. Mess food quality also decreased after a couple of months, but is restored upon complaint to the dean's office.

reviews.review_heading: Strong academics, great exposure and college provide everything you need except money for fests.
reviews.review_text: Bio engineering at IIT Mandi has smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, advanced labs and a well stocked central library. Hostels are clean with good amenities, the mess food is decent, medical facilities are available on campus and sports facilities are excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities, but they can always be better.
reviews.review_text: It's a newer IIT that is second-generation III, so the hostels are good. One thing I don't like is that we are four people in a room, which I think is a room for 2 people. The Wi-Fi facility is good. The food can be better, and for sports and games, it's above satisfactory.

reviews.review_heading: Review of the Indian Institute of Technology Mandi.
reviews.review_text: We all know that the infrastructure and facilities of any IIT college are top-class. IIT Mandi is no exception. The entire campus of IIT Mandi is divided into two parts - the North Campus and the South Campus. There are around 10 hostels in IIT Mandi. Each room has a bed, study desk, chair, wardrobe, and attached bathroom.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely loving it, it's a different place, good interactions, lovely nature, and best placements.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is good, I mean nice bus, not as good as it could be because of obvious reasons, the physical location of IIT Mandi is in the mountains and there it is not possible to construct such big buildings, but we are provided with common room, pantry room, vending machines shared between hostels nearby, study room, washing machines, and fridge all.

reviews.review_heading: It's the most beautiful college with such a beautiful environment, It's lovely.
reviews.review_text: The course curriculum is good, and all the required facilities are in the hostel as well. We have laundry, a pantry, sports rooms, a fan, a table, a chair, and an almira (cupboard), everything in our rooms. Wi-Fi facilities, well-established labs, and nice classrooms with a projector, board and AC.

reviews.review_heading: Collection is awesome, such a beautiful location.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteens, medical, classroom with AC, sports, mess, and all are available on campus. We have common room, study room, Wi-Fi, vending machine, pantry room, and laundry room. We also have table, chair, and almirah in hostel. Its a good experience to live on such a beautiful campus.

reviews.review_heading: Heaven in mountains - IIT Mandi.
reviews.review_text: Classes are in very good condition, and the cleanliness is top-tier. For summer, there is air conditioning, and for winter, there are heaters. The Wi-Fi is also good. The mess food is good, and sports facilities are very good. All the grounds are well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: IIT Mandi has excellent placement, infrastructure, faculty and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of courses in IIT Mandi is excellent. Free Wi-Fi is available for students in every hostel, classroom, and library. All buildings of IIT Mandi are new. Classrooms have AC facility, charging points at every bench, a study environment, and are in excellent condition. A central library is present there which contains over 50,000 books. Hostel facility is also excellent in IIT Mandi. There are available indoor games (table tennis, etc.), washing machines, Wi-Fi, theater, geysers, ...

reviews.review_heading: It has pretty good infrastructure, good research Is going on and has good placements in 2023.
reviews.review_text: Since it's a 2009 built IIT, it has pretty good infrastructure. It has all the required labs with all the necessary equipment. Every hostel, mess, and academic block has a Wi-Fi connection. In rooms, they provide a bed, study table, chair, and a locker. Mess and canteen food is okay; South Indians may face issues with the food.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely below average as compared to other IITs. Too much restrictions here.
reviews.review_text: Overall the infra is good. Wi-Fi and Internet connectivity are very good throughout the campus. We have a good library fully air-conditioned and warm and neat and clean also. The classroom is also good. Labs are also good like others.
