Students who get the hostel facility have to pay for the hostel charges, which include various one-time and semester-wise payable components such as Mess Fee, Medical Fee, Hostel Amenities Fund, etc. Find below the IIT Mandi hostel fee for various courses:
Note: The fee structure for all courses is for the batch of 2022.
Disclaimer: This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
For MTech, candidates need to visit the official website of GATE to register online. The application fee for male students is INR 1,700, and INR 850 for female students.

Eligible candidates who are applying directly to the official website of IIT Mandi, can pay the application fee for IIT Mandi MTech admission is INR 200 (General/EWS/OBC/OBC (NCL)/Transgender/Foreign Nationals). The application fee for Women/SC/ST/PD is INR 100.

The total tuition fee for BTech is INR 8.08 lakh. This information is from official sanctioning body and can change. In addition, the total course fee will be higher as it will include other components such as admission fee, caution money deposit, hostel charges (if applicable), etc., as well. You also have to pay for hostel fee of INR 2.46 lakh and one-time payable charges of INR 20,000. The mentioned fee is as per the official website/ sanctioning body. It is subject to revision and hence, is indicative.

admission_process.title: Institute of Engineering and Management Studies Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Institute of Engineering and Management Studies admission2025 is both merit and entrance-based. The college offers 59 programmes at the UG, PG, Advanced Masters and Certificate levels in various fields, including Engineering, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design, Mass Communication and Media, Law, Humanities and Social Sciences, Hospitality and Travel, Science, Teaching and Education, Animation and Aviation, etc. The mode of study for the offered courses is part time. The institute accepts exams, such as Odisha CHSE, CBSE 10th, and CBSE 12th, for admission to some specificInstitute of Engineering and Management Studies courses. For certain programmes, the college considers the merit of the last qualifying exam of candidates, ensuring a comprehensive approach to admissions. Read more details around Institute of Engineering and Management Studies admission in the following article.
Institute of Engineering and Management StudiesDuration: The college offers UG courses for 2 years - 5 years. For courses at PG level, the duration is 2 years - 3 years.

faqs.answer: A:    The highest Package for the batch of 2022 stood at 23 LPA for B.Tech & 32 LPA for BBA with 80+ companies visiting the institution in 2022. The average package was 3.9 LPA, 2021 batch, increased to 5.5LPA for the 2022 batch and is expected to rise to about 6.5LPA for the 2023 session. For the ongoing batch 2023, the highest package as of now stands at 54LPA, and about 290 companies have visited the college till date.
faqs.question: What is the highest package offered at Faculty of Engineering and Technology, Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, a BTech degree makes students eligible for various jobs in government departments and organisations (both Central and State). This happens because BTech equips students with the necessary skills to crack government job exams, such as statistical skills, logical reasoning, problem-solving, and more. Tabulated below are some of the job profiles for students to pursue after completion of a BTech degree from FET MRIIRS:Government Job ProfilesTax/Excise OfficerIndustries Officer (Technical
faqs.question: Are there any government job opportunities that I can seek after completing B.Tech from FET MRIIRS?

faqs.answer: A:    The top recruiters of FET MRIIRS for B.Tech graduates are IT Services Giants: TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant, Accenture, HCL TechnologiesProduct Development Companies: Amazon, Microsoft, Samsung, Google, IBMStartups and Emerging Tech: Razorpay, Zomato, Myntra, Ola, SwiggyTelecom and Networking: Airtel, Vodafone Idea, Reliance Jio, Ericsson, CiscoConsumer Electronics: Samsung, LG, Sony, Panasonic, BSHAerospace and Defense: ISRO, DRDO, HAL, BELAutomobile and Manufacturing: Maruti Suzuki, Hyu
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of FET MRIIRS?

faqs.answer: A:    According to the MRIIRS Engineering NIRF report 2023, the median package offered to Bachelor of Technology and Master of Technology students during MRIIRS placements 2022 was INR 4 Lacs Per Annum and INR 4.2 Lacs Per Annum, respectively. The top recruiters of the Faculty of Engineering and Technology, MRIIRS during the past years included leading companies like Accenture, IBM, Amazon, TCS, Cognizant, HCL, Wipro, etc.
faqs.question: How is the placement at the Faculty of Engineering and Technology, MRIIRS?

faqs.answer: A:    The fees for various UG courses in FET MRIIRS is as foloows:BE- 49.5-11 LpaBsc- 3.8- 4.2 LpaMtech- 2.1- 2.6 lPAMRIIRS University Placements 2023 recorded the highest package of INR 54 LPA which increased from INR 32 LPA. 290 recruiters participated in the placement drive.
faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at FET MRIIRS?

faqs.answer: A:    At Manav Rachna CDOE, the courses are offered at very reasonable fee ranges, with all the undergraduate and postgraduate courses ranging below INR 2,00,000. You can also check College official website or shiksha website to check the fee structure for different courses.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: My learnings during the four years of engineering at Manav Rachna.

review_content.Placements: The maximum students placed in my college was around half of the total strength. The highest package at that time was around 1 LPA, mostly from small IT companies. Most students from the ME branch did internships at JBM Motors, Gurugram, for Graduate Engineer Trainee jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The labs in our department had good working equipment where practicals could be performed easily. The college library was excellent, having all varieties of books for any branch. I didn't have any problems in searching for books in the library. The library has full Wi-Fi and is air-conditioned. Classrooms were normal, having air conditioning facilities. I didn't stay at the hostel; therefore, I didn't have much idea about it.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Balanced learning environment with strong labs and good placement.

review_content.Placements: The placement rate at my campus is about 100 percent. The average package in the civil department is 4 LPA to 6 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Mega, Ultratech, etc. Around 100 percent of students got internships from any course. The top roles offered in my course are Structural Design Engineer, Site Engineer, and Highway Designer.
review_content.Infrastructure: MRIIRS has smart classrooms. The labs are quite well-equipped for civil engineering. Especially, we have labs like the survey lab, structure lab, concrete technology lab, soil mechanics lab, and fluid mechanics lab. There is a central library for both digital and physical resources.

courses.overview: Faculty of Engineering and Technology, Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies Faculty of Engineering and Technology, Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies Faqs:

faqs.answer: There are multiple M.Tech streams in FET MRIIRS, and the average fees for M.Tech is between 2.1 LPA to 2.6 LPA. There are a total of 16 M.Tech courses in the institution. To check other courses fee you can visit the college website.For M.Tech admissions GATE, CUET -Pg exam is also considered and the eligibility is minmum 50 percent in Graduation (10+2)
faqs.question: Q: What are the fees for M.Tech programmes at FET MRIIRS?

faqs.answer: Yes, FET MRIIRS does accept JEE Main scores for admission to B.Tech programs along with other exams like MRNAT, SAT India, and Uni-GAUGE.Adding more to this a valid JEE Main score is mandatory for admission to most B.Tech programs at FET MRIIRS and as well many other colleges in India. The weightage given to JEE Main scores in the selection process varies depending on the programme and year. You can find the specific weightage for each programme on the FET MRIIRS website.The best part is that the institute has no minimum percentile score required for all the B.Tech Programs, but also one thing to know here is that the cut-off scores for each programme vary.
faqs.question: Q: Does FET MRIIRS accept JEE score?

faqs.answer: Life at FET MRIIRS (Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies) is quite enriching and fulfilling for all of the students. However, the experience may vary based on individual preferences, interests, and the campus culture at the institution. Campus life is very good it has many facilities such as basketball ground and proper trainer, also has a shooting area with proper training and highly trained professionals are there for your help and let you learn also there are much more other games to play (including indor). Life is also very busy because of strict follow of curiculumn of the University and courses. But college also organize various fests and events timely. Also the college campus is well connected to metro. There is also a good facility for canteen. Campus is well maintained and clean.
faqs.question: Q: How is life at FET MRIIRS?

faqs.answer: The unique thing about the Faculty of Engineering and Technology at Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies is that the college is consistently able to manage itself in the names of top engineering institutions in India.One of the facts of the Faculty of Engineering and Technology at Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies is that the college is ranked 103rd in the NIRF India rankings 2022 by MHRD.It is the first college in Haryana to be among the Top 100 private engineering institutes in Outlook India's Best College Ranking for the year 2022.The college also has Collaborations with companies like IBM and Su-Kam to offer industry-integrated B.Tech programs with assured placements for the students on campus.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Tech in EEE at Faculty of Engineering and Technology- Manav Rachna International University?
overview_faqs.answer: Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies (MRIIRS) has a fee structure that comprises of a list of the following components:Tuition FeeDevelopment FeeUniversity FeeStudent Resource FeeTraining Partner FeeThe yearly fee is collected as divided into 2 installments. These are to be deposited via online transfer to the University account, whose details can be obtained from the Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies (MRIIRS) online website.The fees for the academic year 2023-24 is around 1.75-1.90Lac for Electrical & Electronics Engineering.For detailed Fee-Structure for the specific course, please visit the official website of MRIIRS to ensure Up-to-date information.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fees for M.Tech programmes at FET MRIIRS?
overview_faqs.answer: There are multiple M.Tech streams in FET MRIIRS, and the average fees for M.Tech is between 2.1 LPA to 2.6 LPA. There are a total of 16 M.Tech courses in the institution. To check other courses fee you can visit the college website.For M.Tech admissions GATE, CUET -Pg exam is also considered and the eligibility is minmum 50 percent in Graduation (10+2)

overview_faqs.question: What is unique about FET MRIIRS?
overview_faqs.answer: The unique thing about the Faculty of Engineering and Technology at Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies is that the college is consistently able to manage itself in the names of top engineering institutions in India.One of the facts of the Faculty of Engineering and Technology at Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies is that the college is ranked 103rd in the NIRF India rankings 2022 by MHRD.It is the first college in Haryana to be among the Top 100 private engineering institutes in Outlook India's Best College Ranking for the year 2022.The college also has Collaborations with companies like IBM and Su-Kam to offer industry-integrated B.Tech programs with assured placements for the students on campus.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for FET MRIIRS?
overview_faqs.answer: The fee structure at FET MRIIRS (Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies) can vary based on the program, level of study, and other factors. The institute offers various courses, and each programme may have its own fee structure. For B.Tech. it will cost you around Rs. 8,86,000 somewhere, for B.Sc. Geology honors it will cost you around Rs. 3,78,000, for M.Sc. it will cost you around Rs. 2,52,000 and for M.Tech. it will cost you around Rs. 3,48,000. This all is according to my estimate at this time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A solid college choice with updated labs, internship opportunities, and improved placement.

content.Placements: The highest package is of 55 LPA, and the lowest is 3-4 LPA and 70-75%of students got placed. Well-known companies participated in the placement drive like TCS, HCL, Capgemini, Cognizant, which offer top roles like software engineer, Web developer, Data analyst and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Our department provides well-maintained infrastructure and facilities to support academic and practical learning. There is also a sports arena where there is a coach of boxing, shooting and many sports instruments. Wi-fi is also available on campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Manav Rachna campus placement review

content.Placements: The Civil Engineering Department at SET, MRIIRS, along with the CRC, provides strong placement support, offering nearly 95 percent placement for eligible students, and through technical guidance and interview preparation, they help students become industry-ready.
content.Infrastructure: The department offers good infrastructure, including high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped civil engineering labs, and an updated library with relevant books and journals. The hostels provide clean rooms and essential amenities, and the mess offers decent-quality food with a variety of options.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: My learnings during the four years of engineering at Manav Rachna.

content.Placements: The maximum students placed in my college was around half of the total strength. The highest package at that time was around 1 LPA, mostly from small IT companies. Most students from the ME branch did internships at JBM Motors, Gurugram, for Graduate Engineer Trainee jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The labs in our department had good working equipment where practicals could be performed easily. The college library was excellent, having all varieties of books for any branch. I didn't have any problems in searching for books in the library. The library has full Wi-Fi and is air-conditioned. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Balanced learning environment with strong labs and good placement.

content.Placements: The placement rate at my campus is about 100 percent. The average package in the civil department is 4 LPA to 6 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Mega, Ultratech, etc. Around 100 percent of students got internships from any course. The top roles offered in my course are Structural Design Engineer, Site Engineer, and Highway Designer.
content.Infrastructure: MRIIRS has smart classrooms. The labs are quite well-equipped for civil engineering. Especially, we have labs like the survey lab, structure lab, concrete technology lab, soil mechanics lab, and fluid mechanics lab. There is a central library for both digital and physical resources.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of all facilities.

content.Placements: The placement cell is active and supportive. We get regular training sessions, aptitude practice, interview preparation, and soft-skill development. Many companies visit the campus, and students get good opportunities in both core and non-core sectors. Internships are also provided in the third, fifth, and final years, which really help in gaining experience.
content.Infrastructure: MRIIRS has very good infrastructure. The classrooms are clean and air-conditioned. Labs are well-equipped, and the library has a great study environment. Civil Engineering labs like Surveying, Concrete Technology, Environmental, Geotechnical, and Structures are modern and provide hands-on learning. The campus is green, well-maintained, and has strong Wi-Fi, sports facilities, and good canteens.

admission_process.title: Faculty of Engineering and Technology MRIIRS Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Faculty of Engineering and Technology (FET) is a department under MRIIRS (deemed-to-be University) that provides UG, PG and doctoral-level courses in the field of Engineering, Technology and Science. Approved by the NBA for a few BTech programmes, it offers BTech, BSc, MSc and MTech courses via the 11 departments functioning under it in close tandem with each other. Admission toFaculty of Engineering and Technologyis entrance based provided that the students meet the minimum eligibility criteria set by the deemed-to-be University. To know the latest information related to Faculty of Engineering and Technology admission 2025, go through the below sections:

Faculty of Engineering and Technology courses admission is open. The institute offers courses at UG and PG level. Additionally, the institute offers lateral entry in BTech. Admission to BTech, BSc, MTech and MSc is entrance-based. Check outFaculty of Engineering and Technology courseeligibility & selection criteria in the following table:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 10 and Class 12 from a recognised board
MRNAT,JEE Main
Class 10 and Class 12 in any stream from a recognised board
Gradution degree in relevant feild
Graduation degree from a recognised board

Faculty of Engineering and Technology feeis a sum of various components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Some of the fee components like caution deposit are one-time paid while tuition fee is paid annually. Coming to affordability, it is one of the strong reasons why many don't opt for a degree or a college. While the availability of education loans and scholarships have made education accessible but the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. Check below the total tuition fee for Faculty of Engineering and Technology courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Faculty of Engineering and Technology seat intake varies course-wise. Candidates are offered seats based on their merit. Once the seat is allotted, candidates are required to pay the course fee to confirm their admission. Below is the intake for Faculty of Engineering and Technology courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Faculty of Engineering and Technology admission process includes filling out the application form and qualifying for the selection rounds. Check below the detailed steps of Faculty of Engineering and Technology admission 2025:
STEP 1: Application Process 2025

Applicants are required to register for accepted entrance exam to fill out theFaculty of Engineering and Technology admission criteria for some BTech and MTech, respectively. Candidates need to visit the official website of college for admission to all its courses.
STEP 2: Selection Round
Faculty of Engineering and Technology selects applicants for all based on entrance exams. To get admission candidates are must appear in accepted entrance exam and score good..
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
The selected applicants must complete their enrollment by submitting the required fee within the given deadline to confirm and grab the final seat.

courses_data.description: Faculty of Engineering and Technology, Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies offers a 4-year BE/BTech programme at the UG level. Students who meet the minimum eligibility criteria and have a valid score on the JEE Main exam can apply. Here is a quick summary of the key highlights for the Faculty of Engineering and Technology, Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies BE/BTech programme, including its eligibility, fees and dates:

faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Tech in EEE at Faculty of Engineering and Technology- Manav Rachna International University?
faqs.answer: Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies (MRIIRS) has a fee structure that comprises of a list of the following components:Tuition FeeDevelopment FeeUniversity FeeStudent Resource FeeTraining Partner FeeThe yearly fee is collected as divided into 2 installments. These are to be deposited via online transfer to the University account, whose details can be obtained from the Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies (MRIIRS) online website.The fees for the aca

faqs.question: Is the JEE Main Exam compulsory for admission to the B.Tech. course at the Faculty of Engineering and Technology, MRIIRS?
faqs.answer: At the Faculty of Engineering and Technology, Bachelor of Technology admission is subject to a valid score/rank in one among Manav Rachna National Aptitude Test, JEE Main SAT and university-GAUGE exams while those willing to take admission to Bachelor of Technology Lateral Entry are required to appear for the MRNAT exam only. However, the Faculty of Engineering and Technology, MRIIRS offers direct admission.

faqs.question: How many marks are necessary for B.Tech in EEE at Faculty of Engineering and Technology- Manav Rachna International University?
faqs.answer: As of date, Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies (MRIIRS) offers only a single B.Tech programme in Electrical & Electronics Engineering. This programme has an eligibility criteria that requires the students in 10+2 with 50% marks with the following subjects put together:English, Physics, MathematicsOne of Chemistry, Computer Science, Biology or BiotechnologyOne subject with the highest score out of the remaining subjectsThe selection process is then based on their scores

courses_data.name: Faculty of Engineering and Technology MRIIRS BSc Admission 2024
courses_data.description: In addition to BTech, Faculty of Engineering and Technology MRIIRS also offers a three-year BSc (Hons) in Geology programme to the students. Admission to this course is offered on the basis of a valid score in MRNAT exam conducted by MRIIRS. The faculty has allotted 40 seats for this course. Check out the minimum eligibility for BSc (Hons) in Geology in the below table: Course Eligibility BSc (Hons) in Geology A pass in Class 12 (with Science stream) with at least 50% aggregate in 5 subjects including English as a compulsory subject

courses_data.name: Faculty of Engineering and Technology MRIIRS MTech Admission 2024
courses_data.description: This faculty offers two-year MTech programme under seven specialisations with a mix of part-time and full-time mode of education. Candidates seeking admission must appear for GATE exam and apply only if they meet with the minimum eligibility criteria set by the deemed-to be University MRIIRS.

faqs.question: Where can a candidate check FET MRIIRS cutoff 2023?
faqs.answer: A candidate can find  FET MRIIRS cutoff on the official page of college. One can also check the same on Shiksha website. Currently admissions to various courses are also open and there are various entrance exams to be given for admission here. For B.Tech admissions MRNAT,JEE MAINS, SAT India, CUET. The cut off marks for these exam are mostly considered and for Masters its mostly GATE score.

courses_data.name: Faculty of Engineering and Technology MRIIRS MSc Admission 2024
courses_data.description: Apart from MTech, Faculty of Engineering and Technology MRIIRS also offers MSc across two specialisations with a combined seat intake of 40 students. Faculty of Engineering and Technology MRIIRS MSc admission is subject to a qualifying score in MRNAT exam conducted by the deemed-to-be University. Also, students are required to adhere to the minimum eligibility norms as mentioned in the below table: MSc Specialisation Seat Intake Eligibility Biotechnology 20 each A minimum of 50% aggregate in BSc with any subject related to Life Sciences Geology A minimum of 50% aggregate in any graduation degree from a recognised university or a bachelor’s degree in Geology/Applied Geology

faqs.question: What is the admission process for B.Tech at MRIIRS Faculty of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Step 1: Fill an online application form through the respective college website.Step 2: Upload your documents.Step 3:12th standard mark sheet (if result is yet not announced : school ID card + score card of XI class / predictive score of XII class issued by school authorities): MandatoryFor UG Engineering Programmes, mark sheets/score of merit defining document i.e. Valid Score of JEE Mains/SAT/UNIGAUGE, as applicable, in which the candidate has appeared.For B.Arch Programme, mark sheets/score of merit defining document i.e. Valid Score of JEE Mains/NATA, as applicable, in which the candidate has appeared.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for B.Tech at FET MRIIRS?
faqs.answer: The annual seat intake for the B.Tech at FET MRIIRS is Approximately 1,000 seats which are available across all B.Tech programs offered at FET MRIIRS.If we categorize it based on branches then it is Mechanical has the highest intake of 250 - 300 seats.fields like Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AI-ML) and Data Science and Analytics might have smaller intakes in the range of 60 to 80 seats initially, but these numbers can increase due to growing demand.The remaining programs generally have intakes between 50 and 150 seats each.

faqs.question: When is FET MRIIRS application forms out?
faqs.answer: The application forms for FET MRIIRS for their B.Tech programs for the upcoming academic year (2024-2025) are not yet available, please do keep visiting their website for regular updates on the Application and also keep in mind that there is an application fee that needs to be paid for filling up the application as an application fee.because the form is generally rolled out between the middle of December and the middle of February of the next year.Also, subscribe to the official newsletter of the FET MRIIRS.

faqs.question: Does FET MRIIRS accept JEE score?
faqs.answer: Yes, FET MRIIRS does accept JEE Main scores for admission to B.Tech programs along with other exams like MRNAT, SAT India, and Uni-GAUGE.Adding more to this a valid JEE Main score is mandatory for admission to most B.Tech programs at FET MRIIRS and as well many other colleges in India. The weightage given to JEE Main scores in the selection process varies depending on the programme and year. You can find the specific weightage for each programme on the FET MRIIRS website.The best part is that the institute has no minimum percentile score required for all the B.Tech Programs, but also one thing to know here is that the cut-off scores for each programme vary.

placement_data.title: Faculty of Engineering & Technology MRIIRS Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: The placement report of Faculty of Engineering & Technology MRIIRS is yet to be released for the batch passing out in 2023. However, Manav Rachna International Institute of Research & Studies (MRIIRS) has released the NIRF report 2023 on its official website. According to the MRIIRS Engineering NIRF report 2023, 427 BTech and 35 MTech students were placed during the 2022 placements. Further, the median package offered to BTech and MTech students during MRIIRS placements 2022 was INR 4 LPA and INR 4.2 LPA, respectively. The top recruiters of the Faculty of Engineering & Technology MRIIRS during the past years included leading companies like TCS, Cognizant, HCL, Wipro, Accenture, IBM, Amazon , etc.

tables.context: Are there any government job opportunities that I

faqs.question: What is the average package offered to students at the Faculty of Engineering and Technology, MRIIRS?
faqs.answer: According to the MRIIRS Engineering NIRF report 2023, the median package offered to Bachelor of Technology and Master of Technology students during MRIIRS placements was INR 4 LPA and INR 4.2 LPA, respectively. The top recruiters of the Faculty of Engineering and Technology at Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies during the past years included leading companies like HCL, Wipro, TCS, Cognizant, Accenture, IBM, Amazon, etc.

faqs.question: How good are B.Tech placements at FET MRIIRS?
faqs.answer: FET MRIIRS has not yet released the official placement data for the BTech courses. However, the institute’s NIRF report 2023 has been released. As per that, a total of 427 BTech students were placed during the 2022 placements. Further, the median package offered to BTech students stood at INR 4 LPA.

faqs.question: Are there any government job opportunities that I can seek after completing B.Tech from FET MRIIRS?
faqs.answer: Yes, a BTech degree makes students eligible for various jobs in government departments and organisations (both Central and State). This happens because BTech equips students with the necessary skills to crack government job exams, such as statistical skills, logical reasoning, problem-solving, and more. Tabulated below are some of the job profiles for students to pursue after completion of a BTech degree from FET MRIIRS: Government Job Profiles Tax/Excise Officer Industries Officer (Technical) Junior Research Assistant Jr. Software Developer Junior Engineer Social Worker Excise Inspector System Engineers

faqs.question: What are the fees for M.Tech programmes at FET MRIIRS?
faqs.answer: There are multiple M.Tech streams in FET MRIIRS, and the average fees for M.Tech is between 2.1 LPA to 2.6 LPA. There are a total of 16 M.Tech courses in the institution. To check other courses fee you can visit the college website. For M.Tech admissions GATE, CUET -Pg exam is also considered and the eligibility is minmum 50 percent in Graduation (10+2)

faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Tech in EEE at Faculty of Engineering and Technology- Manav Rachna International University?
faqs.answer: Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies (MRIIRS) has a fee structure that comprises of a list of the following components: Tuition Fee Development Fee University Fee Student Resource Fee Training Partner Fee The yearly fee is collected as divided into 2 installments. These are to be deposited via online transfer to the University account, whose details can be obtained from the Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies (MRIIRS) online website. The fees for the academic year 2023-24 is around 1.75-1.90Lac for Electrical & Electronics Engineering. For detailed Fee-Structure for the specific course, please visit the official website of MRIIRS to ensure Up-to-date information.

faqs.question: What is the fee for FET MRIIRS?
faqs.answer: The fee structure at FET MRIIRS (Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies) can vary based on the program, level of study, and other factors. The institute offers various courses, and each programme may have its own fee structure. For B.Tech. it will cost you around Rs. 8,86,000 somewhere, for B.Sc. Geology honors it will cost you around Rs. 3,78,000, for M.Sc. it will cost you around Rs. 2,52,000 and for M.Tech. it will cost you around Rs. 3,48,000. This all is according to my estimate at this time.

faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at FET MRIIRS?
faqs.answer: The fees for various UG courses in FET MRIIRS is as foloows: BE- 49.5-11 Lpa Bsc- 3.8- 4.2 Lpa Mtech- 2.1- 2.6 lPA MRIIRS University Placements 2023 recorded the highest package of INR 54 LPA which increased from INR 32 LPA. 290 recruiters participated in the placement drive.

hostel.description: The hostels have well-furnished rooms with essential modern facilities like tv, telephone, wi-fi, newspapers and RO drinking water. The hostels have well managed and hygienic mess, where nutritional needs and taste of students are taken care of. There are many categories of rooms in hostels–air conditioned, non-air-conditioned, single seater, two-seaters, three seater and five seater rooms with attached/ common bathrooms. An ergonomically and aesthetically designed hostel basically meant for international students is also available with all state-of-the-art facilities. Regular transport services are available between off-campus hostels and campus.

library.description: Dr. O. P. Bhalla Central Library maintains a fine balance of print and digital collection for academic pursuits. The collection can access campus-wide through dedicated LAN and select e-resources and online catalogue can be accessed over the web. Libray has a huge collection of 1,09,511 books, 1,83,277 e-books, 15 E-Readers – Kindles, 216 print journals & magazines, 22 newspapers, 29313 e-journals, 3677 CDs/ DVDs, 1272 bounded journals, 2944 theses/ dissertations/ project reports and 15 online databases. The central library also has the institutional membership of the American Library.

reviews.review_heading: A solid college choice with updated labs, internship opportunities, and improved placement.
reviews.review_text: Our department provides well-maintained infrastructure and facilities to support academic and practical learning. There is also a sports arena where there is a coach of boxing, shooting and many sports instruments. Wi-fi is also available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Manav Rachna campus placement review
reviews.review_text: The department offers good infrastructure, including high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped civil engineering labs, and an updated library with relevant books and journals. The hostels provide clean rooms and essential amenities, and the mess offers decent-quality food with a variety of options.

reviews.review_heading: My learnings during the four years of engineering at Manav Rachna.
reviews.review_text: The labs in our department had good working equipment where practicals could be performed easily. The college library was excellent, having all varieties of books for any branch. I didn't have any problems in searching for books in the library. The library has full Wi-Fi and is air-conditioned. Classrooms were normal, having air conditioning facilities. I didn't stay at the hostel; therefore, I didn't have much idea about it.

reviews.review_heading: Balanced learning environment with strong labs and good placement.
reviews.review_text: MRIIRS has smart classrooms. The labs are quite well-equipped for civil engineering. Especially, we have labs like the survey lab, structure lab, concrete technology lab, soil mechanics lab, and fluid mechanics lab. There is a central library for both digital and physical resources.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of all facilities.
reviews.review_text: MRIIRS has very good infrastructure. The classrooms are clean and air-conditioned. Labs are well-equipped, and the library has a great study environment. Civil Engineering labs like Surveying, Concrete Technology, Environmental, Geotechnical, and Structures are modern and provide hands-on learning. The campus is green, well-maintained, and has strong Wi-Fi, sports facilities, and good canteens.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college if you want to enjoy your college life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are top notch and also the Wi-Fi is very good and connectivity is very good, labs are fully air conditioned and well maintained, classrooms are SMART board equipped and library have more tha 2000 books which is very nice.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfying because of the many facilities and the faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities, as they provide us with free Wi-Fi, have AC in every classroom, and have 3 big libraries where any student can go and study. The labs are also very good, as they have the latest machines and a good environment.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty members, facilities, infrastructure, and placement.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides well-maintained and structured labs, classroom, library, and overall Wi-Fi is available on campus. Our college has eco-friendly environment. It is highly maintained and hygienic. Quality of food available in the hostel, mess, and canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: You can take admission if you don't get admission in the top government colleges.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are well-maintained and rooms are of adequate size. Security is maintained 24X7. They also have a sports ground for football and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure and faculty, but placement support needs major improvement.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good and the whole cleanliness of the college is maintained 24/7. Labs are equipped with high-tech faculty members. Hotels are also very good and the food provided in the mess is good. As for games a lot of area has been dedicated to it.

reviews.review_heading: The college is not at all worth the money.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is poor. In classrooms, you will find wooden benches and one class can have 60 to 65 students crammed into a very small space. The benches are not sufficient for everyone; if all students attend on the same day, half of them will not get a seat. The Wi-Fi is non-existent and never works. Labs are similarly just for namesake; in computer labs, many computers do not work, and in the chemistry lab, you will only be given a few experiments to perform, and typically just one readin...

reviews.review_heading: MRIIRS is a good option for students.
reviews.review_text: There’s a review of the infrastructure for my course and hostel at Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies. The infrastructure for my course includes classrooms that are air-conditioned, spacious, and well-maintained. They are equipped with modern teaching aids like projectors, smart boards, and audio-visual equipment. Labs are well-equipped with the latest equipment and software relevant to my course. The lab assistants are helpful and supportive. The library is well-stocke...

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides decent placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is well maintained. Our college provides separate departments for faculty members. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. Labs and classrooms are very well maintained. A gym is available on the campus. We have huge Libraries. Classrooms have smart boards. Computer labs are well maintained. The food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Manav Rachna University goes beyond academics to focus on the holistic development of its students.
reviews.review_text: We got almost everything in our college that is required for our course. We have every lab for every course, and we have free Wi-Fi for students, which connects through their roll number. We got smart boards and smart classrooms, and we have at least 10 restaurants in our college, and all of them are the best.

reviews.review_heading: Outdated and irrelevant engineering curriculum.
reviews.review_text:
Library at Manav is the main attraction of the entire campus. It is a world class library and has all kinds of reading material from fiction, None fiction to curriculum related books. Also the library is open 24/7 and has a free Wi-Fi available for all the students. The library staff is friendly and helps out in borrowing and returning books using your college ID
Hostel is a bit expensive to live in with a yearly rent of 55000 including the food and furnitured and sharing rooms. The mess food is...

Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies (MRIIRS) has a fee structure that comprises of a list of the following components:
Tuition Fee
Development Fee
University Fee
Student Resource Fee
Training Partner Fee

The yearly fee is collected as divided into 2 installments. These are to be deposited via online transfer to the University account, whose details can be obtained from the Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies (MRIIRS) online website.
The fees for the academic year 2023-24 is around 1.75-1.90Lac for Electrical & Electronics Engineering.
For detailed Fee-Structure for the specific course, please visit the official website of MRIIRS to ensure Up-to-date information.

The fee structure at FET MRIIRS (Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies) can vary based on the program, level of study, and other factors. The institute offers various courses, and each programme may have its own fee structure.  For B.Tech. it will cost you around Rs. 8,86,000 somewhere, for B.Sc. Geology honors it will cost you around Rs. 3,78,000, for M.Sc. it will cost you around Rs. 2,52,000 and for M.Tech. it will cost you around Rs. 3,48,000. This all is according to my estimate at this time.
The fees for various UG courses in FET MRIIRS is as foloows:
Bsc- 3.8- 4.2 Lpa
Mtech- 2.1- 2.6 lPA

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Sound Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Faculty, infrastructure, and campus are all good.

content.Placements: Good placement and internship opportunities from reputed companies in their respective fields. Top recruiting companies are Byjus, PocketFM, Zeest LLC, Himesh Reshammiya Music Studio Mumbai, and Gameshastra (for audio and music technology). The package includes INR 3–4 L/annum for permanent job roles and INR 10–15 K/month for a 6-month internship program.
content.Infrastructure: Industry-standard equipment includes: Mac Lab, 5.1, 7.1, and Dolby Atmos mixing studios, light and photography rooms, analog rooms, and chroma studios. No hostel or canteen is available. Infrastructure and staff are the best. Parking spaces are available. We do have the best sound studios and facilities to get hands-on experience and training practically. The best possible instruments and sound equipment are available within the college for our use.

admission_overview.college_name: Ajeenkya DY Patil University Seamedu Admission 2025: Courses, Fees, Selection and Application

admission_overview.title: Ajeenkya DY Patil University Seamedu Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Ajeenkya DY Patil University Seamedu admission 2025 is both merit and entrance-based. Interested candidates can apply online on the institute's official website. Ajeenkya DY Patil University Seamedu offers various programmes in International Business, Film Making, Game Art, Photography, Sound Engineering, Game Engineering, Journalism, and Photography. The courses available at the institute are BBA, MBA, BSc, B.A., BTech, and MCA. Ajinkya D Y Patil University also offers certificate courses in Music Production with Ableton Live and Apple Logic Pro, along with a few other courses in Short Film Making, Film Direction, and Game Development. Apart from the Pune campus, Ajeenkya DY Patil University Seamedu also has three other campuses located in Bengaluru, Mumbai, and Chandigarh.

eligibility_selection.title: Ajeenkya DY Patil University Seamedu Eligibility and Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Check Ajeenkya DY Patil University Seamedu eligibility criteria below: Courses

faqs.answer: To get a seat in the MBA programme at Ajeenkya DY Patil University Seamedu, candidates must apply online and qualify with a valid entrance exam score (CAT, XAT, MAT, CMAT, MAH CET, etc.). Shortlisted applicants are then evaluated through the STAC Interview. Admission is offered based on performance and seat availability.
faqs.question: How can I secure a seat in the MBA programme at Ajeenkya DY Patil University Seamedu?

admission_process.title: Ajeenkya DY Patil University Seamedu Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Students can contact the admission office for offline applications if available. Check the admission process below:
Step 1: Ajeenkya DY Patil University Seamedu Registration Process 2025
Register on the official website of Ajeenkya DY Patil University Seamedu, and pay INR 500 against STAC (Seamedu Technical Assessment and Counseling).
Step 2: Ajeenkya DY Patil University Seamedu Selection Process 2025

After successfully registering with the institute, eligible candidates must appear for the STAC Interview, which is conducted online for almost all the courses. While for MBA and MCA, candidates must appear for the Ajeenkya Common Entrance Test.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation

If candidates clear all the criteria, they are selected and informed via email or call. Candidates need to carry all their original documents for verification. All original documents will be returned to you post-verification. The documents are all Marks Transcripts attested by the Ministry of Higher Education. However, to confirm their seat, candidates must pay the tuition fee or a certain amount.

Fees of this university comprise of several components like tuition fees, hostel fees, mess charges, and other charges. The course fee varies with different courses and course levels. placement_data.title: Ajeenkya DY Patil University Seamedu Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The institute concluded its placement drive for the Class of 2024. As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered during Ajeenkya DY Patil University Seamedu placements in 2024 stood at INR 4.5 LPA and INR 2.5 LPA , respectively. The minimum package offered stands at INR 1.8 LPA . Further, 81 recruiters participated in the 2024 placement session and placed 52 students of the 2024 batch in new-age job roles . The placed students are from the BSc Game Art & Design, BSc Sound Engineering, BSc in VFX, BSc Film Making, BSc Photography, BCA, MBA, and Diploma in Sound Engineering batch 2024. The top recruiters of Ajeenkya DY Patil University Seamedu in 2024 included Jnana Prabodhini, CLR India, Ultra Cine, Aquatint, Pocket FM (English), MoonFrog Labs, Oncrete Audio, Patakha Films , etc.

Earlier, the highest package offered during Ajeenkya DY Patil University Seamedu placements in 2023 stood at INR 8.55 LPA. A total of 82 recruiters participated in the 2023 placement session and placed 87 students of the 2023 batch in new-age job roles. The placed students are from the BSc Game Art & Design, BSc VFX, BSc Film Making, BSc Photography, BCA Game Development batch 2024.
For more information about Seamedu School of Pro-Expressionism, Pune Placement, check out the video below:

faqs.question: Do students get their ROI after completing MBA from Seamedu School of Pro-Expressionism, Pune?
faqs.answer: The return on investment for the students of Seamedu School of Pro Expressionism in Pune varies according to individual circumstances, personal objectives, and general job opportunities. Nevertheless, there are several general tendencies which give a clue for the students’ reasoned choice as to whether they should take MBA with SPoE. A study has revealed that nearly ninety two percent of Seamedu School of Pro-Expressionism alumni got employment in less than half a year of graduation. On average, Seamedu School of Pro-Expressionism graduates take home almost ?6 Lacs annually at start. Such figures indicate that Seamedu school of pro- expressionism graduates can get high paying job into different fields. Nonetheless, one should realise that these averages were not based on the unique situations of each graduate. One of such examples is whereby students with high grades and working experience will be paid more that those without such a background. In sum, seamedu schools of pro expressionism seem worthwhile for investors seeking career growth in business. In saying so, however, I should like to remind the students that they ought to be keen and do proper research if they want to have first hand information about the university and what it can offer a student who wants to have his degree via an MBA.

Seamedu library consists books, movies (Bigflix), games, documentaries, subscriptions to magazines, tutorials & study material (Lynda.com) related to various subjects.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Game Development Lab

reviews.review_heading: Faculty, infrastructure, and campus are all good.
reviews.review_text:
Industry-standard equipment includes: Mac Lab, 5.1, 7.1, and Dolby Atmos mixing studios, light and photography rooms, analog rooms, and chroma studios. No hostel or canteen is available.
Infrastructure and staff are the best.
Parking spaces are available. We do have the best sound studios and facilities to get hands-on experience and training practically. The best possible instruments and sound equipment are available within the college for our use.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements, and it has creative studies.
reviews.review_text: The campus and hostel are too good, with great facilities. There are studios and Mac labs with all the equipment needed. The quality of food provided in the mess is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides great faculty members and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all the necessary equipment to learn and grow as an artist. It conducts various fun activities which engage students and keeps the environment fun and learning.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure. It focuses more on practical than theoretical aspects.
reviews.review_text: The labs are good. They are very powerful as well. Wi-Fi is of decent quality and has good speed. There is a common library. I do not live at the hostel. The hostel seats were filled a few months before I came. It is very expensive.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend this college for the students interested in games.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are provided in our college for education and entertainment. Computer lab, VR setup, and a library for reading books are available in our college. Mess and canteen are very good. Our college had a sports ground for outdoor activities like football.

reviews.review_heading: Great place to develop as a sound professional.
reviews.review_text: There is one 5.1 studio, one 7.1 studio, and a Mac lab, and the entire campus has wifi connectivity. The recording and mixing studios are professionally built and acoustically treated by the teaching staff of the college itself. All the systems in the college run on mac OS.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Seamedu - Ajeenkya D Y Patil University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure-wise, Seamedu is an excellent college. Both the studios are high-end and of industry standard. The college has expensive equipment like Neumann Microphones, Avid S3 + Dock, Genelec Speakers, etc. All the computers in the computer labs are Mac PCs with the latest versions of all sound-related software like Ableton Live, Logic Pro X, Pro Tools, Nuendo, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good education, but the management is bad here.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. It provides good labs with plenty of space. It is useful for those who want the technical aspect of music and sound.

reviews.review_heading: Come here for knowledge, not for job.
reviews.review_text:
There is Wi-Fi available but a student rarely gets to use it. Labs are the best as there are iMacs installed to practice whole day long. One classroom is acoustically treated. There are 3 music studios in which one can use anytime by booking (small studio), one 5.1 and 7.1 which only can be used by pro tools certified students (usually 2nd year students if you cleared the exam or 3 rd year)
2. There is no hostel facilities available. One has to find a PG. Canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has free Wi-Fi for the students, the labs are very good and modern, equipped with good technologies. Classrooms have a very good environment too, and all the means needed to teach and learn. The college unfortunately does not have a library. The college doesn't provide hostel services. The college has a canteen though, the food is very good, and hygienic. They do have first aid in the college. Unfortunately the college isn't that much into sports.

reviews.review_heading: The course is extremely good with highly professional faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The college is really good with high-end consoles and labs. It is one of the best in India. The college provides all essential needs such as Wi-Fi and library. Classrooms are also of high standards. The food served in the canteen is not very good when compared to other colleges. The college doesn't provide any hostel services. However, it will assist you in choosing many PGs that are situated around the college. College always tries to solve the infrastructural issues as soon as possible.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of faculty members and the facilities provided by the college.
reviews.review_text: The lab for the VFX and games students are outdated, since 2007. The faculty members are lazy, and their teaching experience is not as per industry standard. The reason for this problem would be the upper management, who are unable to solve this problem, as for the rest of the facilities such as food, classroom, etc., are fairly decent. We don't have any medical nor library facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Seam- A place where dreams come true
reviews.review_text:
Excellent working space, highly advanced sound labs, 5.1 and 7.1 studios. Workstations are provided with Mac, MIDI equipment, etc.
Classrooms seem great. We got a chance to meet a lot of people from different regions of the country as well as the world.

reviews.review_heading: Good place to begin and get in the industry, or buy equipments and learn from YouTube instead.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite impressive, lots of equipment is available for the students, well-equipped studio and lab. Big enough classrooms to fit a batch of 60-70 students in one go. Labs equipped with multiple working computers to work in the college itself.

Seamedu School of Pro Expressionism is small from outside but has all the facilities you need to excel in the field of Sound Engineering. But, I miss a real college atmosphere as there’s no big campus or cultural and sports activities. Classrooms are less in number but well equipped. There’s a small library. Hostel facility is not available, students have to rent a PG or flat and nearby hostels are not up-to mark. The labs are well equipped with all Apple Systems installed with popular DAWS and ... college_info.intro:
IIFT Bareilly offers various UG, PG, PG Diploma, and online certification programmes. The UG course include a BSc in Fashion & Apparel Design. The PG courses include a Master's in Fashion Management, a Post Graduate Diploma in Fashion Styling & Communication, a Post Graduate Diploma in Fashion Design & Boutique Management and an MBA in Fashion and Interior Designing.
Also, the institute provides various interior designing courses which include a Diploma in Interior Designing (6 Months), a Diploma in Interior Designing (1 Year), a PG Diploma in Interior Designing (6 Months), and a PG Diploma in Interior Designing (1 Year). Additionally, the institute provides weekend and online programmes in various specialisations. Below are the IIFT Bareilly popular programmes:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Indian Institute Of Fashion Technology (IIFT) offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from stream such as Design. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.Sc., B.A. and UG Diploma. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Indian Institute Of Fashion Technology (IIFT) offers MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and PG Diploma.

faqs.answer: A:    The admission criteria for all courses at IIFT Bareilly are based on the merit secured by the candidate in the qualifying exam as well as first-come-first-serve basis. The complete admission process for IIFT Bareilly is given below:Application: The mode of application is offline. Candidates must visit the campus and submit the duly filled form at the admission office of the Bareilly Campus.Selection rounds: The candidates are shortlisted based on their merit and on a first-come-first-serve basis. Also, IIFT Bareilly has a limited number of seats for each course; therefore, candidates must apply to their desired course within the stipulated time limit.Admission confirmation: Once the selection rounds are completed, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college. It's important to note that the admission to IIFT courses is only confirmed when the candidate pays the required fee. Candidates must also note that once the fee is submitted, it will not be refunded.
faqs.question: Can I join IIFT Bareilly directly?

faqs.answer: A:    IIFT Bareilly offers a two-year MBA programme in Fashion and Interior Designing.The Indian Institute of Fashion Technology MBA total tuition fee is INR 3 Lacs for two years. The fee is sourced from official sources and is subject to change.Admission to IIFT Bareilly MBA is done on a first-come-first-serve basis and admission will be confirmed only when the aspirant pays the required admission fee.

faqs.answer: A:    The evaluation system for IIFT Bareilly is as follows:There shall be formal examinations.A student is free to pursue a course up to the level she desires.Awards will be given as follows:Diploma shall be awarded only on completion of the course. Certificates will be awarded for short-term courses. All the assessments done during the semester would be added together for the award of grades at the close of the semester.Grades would be awarded according to the following criteria:90% to above – Distinction71% to 89% – Grade A61% to 70% – Grade B50% to 60% – Grade CAny student securing less than the required percentage of marks in any subject will have to re-appear for awards of diploma. The results of each semester would be displayed on the notice board.

All the assessments done during the semester would be added together for the award of grades at the close of the semester.Grades would be awarded according to the following criteria:90% to above – Distinction71% to 89% – Grade A61% to 70% – Grade B50% to 60% – Grade CAny student securing less than the required percentage of marks in any subject will have to re-appear for awards of diploma. The results of each semester would be displayed on the notice board.

review_summary.college_name: South Delhi Polytechnic for Women Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Fashion Design - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is a green institute, and I love the greenery around.

content.Placements: Placements are not very effective in our college. The starting highest salary package offered here is 4 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. The top recruiting companies here are AMPM, etc. About 70% of students got good internships. Top roles offered here are assistant designer and merchandiser.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are not very modern here. The canteen is not very good. The library and the faculty members are awesome. The hostel has very strict wardens. As it is only a girls' institution, there is less leniency. However, the medical facilities are great, and exhibitions and shows are great.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Fashion Design - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with teaching quality.

content.Placements: Placements are complicated because every college gives hope that they would provide placements, but not all colleges offer placements. In the end, students have to search for placement on their own. Export House is the only company I heard, where most of the seniors got placed, and some of them are working in other companies.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi, digital classrooms and air-conditioners are not available here. Only fans and tube lights are available in classrooms. However, there is a huge library. Canteen is just like three mini shops. Medical facilities are average, and we don't have a particular medical room. Food served in the mess is good.

individual_reviews.title: The course curriculum and faculty are good though it lacks in extracurricular activities.

content.Infrastructure: In our college, we are provided with labs, classrooms and a library but not a Wi-Fi facility. The infrastructure is also satisfactory, and the quality of the food available is good. Sports and games are not available inside the campus due to lack of space.

individual_reviews.course: Media Communication - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of supporting teachers and faculty, and they have been motivating throu

content.Placements: Since there were few admissions in the media department, almost everyone got placements opportunities. Internship opportunities were provided to me after the course completion, that was after 3 years, not during the course. Top companies include media graphics and news. The salary package offered can range from Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 20,000 per month. Top roles offered in this course can be photojournalism, news and article writing, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is quite good. There was a good Wi-Fi connection. There are many classrooms and a mediocre library. There are separate rooms for separate departments, which is very nice and avoid chaos. The quality of food provided in the canteen was also good, although the variety is less. individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Dress Design - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members in the college are knowledgeable and helpful.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are satisfactory. If the student has worked hard and performed well in almost everything, then their performance report is shared with the companies. The college prepares students to grab the best placement opportunities. The personality development classes are conducted which do help a lot in placements. Reputed fashion houses also visit the campus for offering internships.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a library with a vintage kind of look, and it has a huge collection of books. The canteen mostly provides packed food, and the quality of the food served is average. Classrooms are clean and well-lit. They are only fans during summers. Hostel rooms are also neat, clean, and ventilated.
